MENU
  • Introduction
  • Authenticating requests
  • Auth
    • Register User
    • Login User
    • Logout User
    • Memanggil User berdasarkan ID
    • Ganti Password User
    • Aktif atau Nonaktif Status User berdasarkan id User.
  • Master
    • Data User dari SIPS Mobile
    • Data Blok dari SIPS Production
    • Data Karyawan dari SIPS Production
    • Data Karyawan per Kemandoran dari SIPS Production
    • Data Kendaraan dari SIPS Production
    • Data Business Unit dari SIPS Production
    • Data Section/Afdeling/Division dari SIPS Production
    • Data Gang dari SIPS Production
    • Maps Geo JSON
      • Memanggil data Map GeoJSON dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Menyimpan data Map GeoJSON ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.
      • Menampilkan data Map Geojson berdasarkan id Map Geojson dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Mengubah data Map Geojson berdasarkan id Map Geojson.
      • Menghapus data Map Geojson berdasarkan id Map Geojson.
  • Apps
    • Karyawan
      • Memanggil data karyawan dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Menyimpan data karyawan ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.
      • Menampilkan data karyawan berdasarkan id karyawan dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Mengubah data karyawan berdasarkan id karyawan.
      • Menghapus data karyawan berdasarkan id karyawan.
    • TPH
      • Memanggil data TPH dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Menyimpan data TPH.
      • Menampilkan data TPH berdasarkan id TPH dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Mengubah data TPH berdasarkan id TPH.
      • Menghapus data TPH berdasarkan id TPH.
    • Ancak
      • Memanggil data ancak dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Menyimpan data ancak ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.
      • Menampilkan data ancak berdasarkan id ancak.
      • Mengubah data ancak berdasarkan id ancak.
      • Menghapus data ancak berdasarkan id ancak.
    • Absensi
      • Memanggil data Absensi dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Menyimpan data Absensi ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.
      • Menampilkan data Absensi berdasarkan id Absensi dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Mengubah data Absensi berdasarkan id Absensi.
      • Menghapus data Absensi berdasarkan id Absensi.
      • Approved atau Reject status_absensi (STATUS_ATTENDANCE) berdasarkan id Absensi.
    • Panen
      • Memanggil data Panen dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Menyimpan data Panen ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.
      • Menampilkan data Panen berdasarkan id Panen dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Mengubah data Panen berdasarkan id Panen.
      • Menghapus data Panen berdasarkan id Panen.
      • Approved atau Reject status_harvesting (STATUS_HARVESTING) berdasarkan id Harvesting.
    • Pengangkutan
      • Memanggil data Pengangkutan dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Menyimpan data Pengangkutan ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.
      • Menampilkan data Pengangkutan berdasarkan id Pengangkutan dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Mengubah data Pengangkutan berdasarkan id Pengangkutan.
      • Menghapus data Pengangkutan berdasarkan id Pengangkutan.
      • Approved atau Reject status_pengangkutan (STATUS_PENGANGKUTAN) berdasarkan id Pengangkutan.
      • Update SPBNO dan ETD berdasarkan id Pengangkutan.
  • Report
    • Memanggil data hasil panen.
    • Memanggil data hasil pengangkutan.
    • Memanggil data hasil langsir.
    • Memanggil data Attendance GAD / Attendance GAD Temp dari SIPS Mobile.
    • Memanggil data Harvesting SPB dari SIPS Mobile.
    • Memanggil data Harvesting Quality dari SIPS Mobile.
    • Memanggil data LHM dari SIPS Mobile.
    • Memanggil data LHM dari SIPS Mobile yang akan diupload.
    • Memanggil data LHA dari SIPS Mobile.
    • Memanggil data Harvesting dari SIPS Mobile.
  • Uploads
    • Upload Attendance ke database SIPS.
    • Upload Harvesting SPB ke database SIPS.
    • Upload Harvesting Quality ke database SIPS.
    • Upload ke SIPS Mobile dari Attendance .
    • Upload ke SIPS Mobile dari Harvesting SPB .
    • Upload ke SIPS Mobile dari Harvesting Quality.
    • Approval LHM SIPSMobile.
    • Open LHM SIPSMobile.
  • App Update
    • Check update aplikasi
    • Upload aplikasi
    • List semua versi aplikasi
    • Hapus versi aplikasi
  • Settings
    • Devices
      • Memanggil data device dari SIPS Mobile.
      • Menyimpan data device ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.
      • Menampilkan data device berdasarkan id device.
      • Mengubah data device berdasarkan id device.
      • Menghapus data device berdasarkan id device.
  • Documentation powered by Scribe ✍
  • Last updated: 11 June 2026

Introduction

SIPS API untuk Mobile dan Frontend

Base URL: http://dev.skj.my.id:82

Dokumentasi ini bertujuan untuk memberikan semua informasi yang Anda butuhkan untuk menggunakan dengan API kami.

Saat Anda scroll ke bawah, anda akan melihat contoh kode untuk menggunakan API dalam berbagai bahasa pemrograman di area gelap di sebelah kanan (atau sebagai bagian dari konten pada tampilan seluler). Anda dapat mengganti bahasa pemrograman yang digunakan melalui tab di kanan atas (atau melalui menu navigasi di kiri atas pada tampilan seluler).

Authenticating requests

Untuk mengautentikasi permintaan, sertakan header Authorization dengan nilai "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}".

Semua endpoint yang diautentikasi ditandai dengan lencana requires authentication dalam dokumentasi di bawah ini.

Auth

Register User

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/register"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('username', 'johndoe');
body.append('fullname', 'John Doe');
body.append('email', 'john@contoh.com');
body.append('phone', '08123456789');
body.append('password', 'rahasia123');
body.append('fcba', 'MSE');
body.append('afdeling', 'AFD-01');
body.append('gangcode', 'PN011');
body.append('level', 'KRP');
body.append('position', 'KR.PANEN');
body.append('idkaryawan', '06-930301-241213-0731');
body.append('photo', document.querySelector('input[name="photo"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/register';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'username',
                'contents' => 'johndoe'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fullname',
                'contents' => 'John Doe'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'email',
                'contents' => 'john@contoh.com'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'phone',
                'contents' => '08123456789'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'password',
                'contents' => 'rahasia123'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fcba',
                'contents' => 'MSE'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'afdeling',
                'contents' => 'AFD-01'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'gangcode',
                'contents' => 'PN011'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'level',
                'contents' => 'KRP'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'position',
                'contents' => 'KR.PANEN'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'idkaryawan',
                'contents' => '06-930301-241213-0731'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'photo',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\phpEB2.tmp', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/register

Headers

Content-Type      

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

username   string   

Username yang unik. Max: 75. Example: johndoe

fullname   string   

Nama lengkap. Max: 100. Example: John Doe

email   string  optional  

Email pengguna (opsional). Harus unik dan valid. Example: john@contoh.com

phone   string  optional  

Nomor telepon (opsional). 9–20 digit. Example: 08123456789

password   string   

Password minimal 8 karakter. Example: rahasia123

fcba   string   

Kode FCBA. Salah satu dari: MSE, MTE, PTE, MRE, DOM, CNT, HOF, ROF, COF. Example: MSE

afdeling   string  optional  

Nama afdeling. Example: AFD-01

gangcode   string  optional  

Kode gang. Example: PN011

level   string  optional  

Level pengguna. Salah satu dari: MGR, KSI, AST, MD1, MDP, KRA, KRT, KRP. Example: KRP

position   string  optional  

Jabatan. Salah satu dari: EM, KASIE, ASISTEN, MANDOR1, MD.PANEN, KR.AFDELING, KR.TRANS, KR.PANEN. Example: KR.PANEN

photo   file  optional  

File gambar JPG/PNG (opsional). Max: 2MB Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\phpEB2.tmp

idkaryawan   string  optional  

Kode karyawan dari tabel employee pada SIPS PRODUCTION. Example: 06-930301-241213-0731

Login User

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/login"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "username": "odit",
    "password": "odio"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/login';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'username' => 'odit',
            'password' => 'odio',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/login

Headers

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

username   string   

Example: odit

password   string   

Example: odio

Logout User

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/logout"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/logout';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/logout

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Memanggil User berdasarkan ID

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/user/17"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/user/17';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (401):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/user/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID pengguna. Example: 17

Ganti Password User

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/change-password"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "current_password": "tempora",
    "new_password": "bhamwtoayezj"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/change-password';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'current_password' => 'tempora',
            'new_password' => 'bhamwtoayezj',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/change-password

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

current_password   string   

Example: tempora

new_password   string   

Must be at least 8 characters. Example: bhamwtoayezj

Aktif atau Nonaktif Status User berdasarkan id User.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/user/4/status"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "status": "N"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/user/4/status';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'status' => 'N',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PATCH api/user/{id}/status

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID User. Example: 4

Body Parameters

status   string   

Example: N

Must be one of:
  • Y
  • N

Master

Data User dari SIPS Mobile

requires authentication

Digunakan untuk melihat seluruh data user yang bisa melakukan kegiatan pada sistem SIPS Mobile. Tetapi jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, buatlah parameter pada Url berdasarkan Query Parameter

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-users"
);

const params = {
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "gangcode": "PNN",
    "level": "AST",
    "position": "ASISTEN",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-users';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'gangcode' => 'PNN',
            'level' => 'AST',
            'position' => 'ASISTEN',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (401):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/master/sips-users

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter User berdasarkan kode FCBA/Business Unit. Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter User berdasarkan kode Afdeling. Example: AFD-01

gangcode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter User berdasarkan kode Gang. Example: PNN

level   string  optional  

Optional. Filter User berdasarkan level User (MGR : MANAGER, AST : ASISTEN, MD1 : MANDOR 1, MDP : MANDOR PANEN, KRP : KERANI PANEN, KRT : KERANI TRANSPORT). Example: AST

position   string  optional  

Optional. Filter User berdasarkan posisi User (EM : MANAGER, ASISTEN : ASISTEN, MANDOR1 : MANDOR 1, MD.PANEN : MANDOR PANEN, KR.PANEN : KERANI PANEN, KR.TRANS : KERANI TRANSPORT) . Example: ASISTEN

Data Blok dari SIPS Production

requires authentication

Digunakan untuk inisialisasi data TPH dan mendata hasil panen

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-fields"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-fields';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (401):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/master/sips-fields

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Data Karyawan dari SIPS Production

requires authentication

Digunakan untuk inisialisasi data Karyawan pada SIPS Mobile untuk penetapan no ancak, absensi dan hasil panen. Tetapi jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, buatlah parameter pada Url berdasarkan Query Parameter

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-karyawans"
);

const params = {
    "fccode": "06-001114-230720-0381",
    "fcname": "REMIANUS NAHAK SERAN",
    "gangcode": "PN01",
    "sectionname": "AFD-01",
    "fcba": "MTE",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-karyawans';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'fccode' => '06-001114-230720-0381',
            'fcname' => 'REMIANUS NAHAK SERAN',
            'gangcode' => 'PN01',
            'sectionname' => 'AFD-01',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (401):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/master/sips-karyawans

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

fccode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Karyawan berdasarkan Kode Karyawan. Example: 06-001114-230720-0381

fcname   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Karyawan berdasarkan Nama Karyawan. Example: REMIANUS NAHAK SERAN

gangcode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Karyawan berdasarkan Kode Gang. Example: PN01

sectionname   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Karyawan berdasarkan Afdeling. Example: AFD-01

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Karyawan berdasarkan Bisnis Unit (FCBA). Example: MTE

Data Karyawan per Kemandoran dari SIPS Production

requires authentication

Digunakan untuk inisialisasi data Karyawan pada SIPS Mobile berdasarkan kemandoran untuk penetapan no ancak, absensi dan hasil panen. Wajib isi semua Parameter di Query Parameter agar tepat kelompok kemandoran yang diambil. Pola gang code karyawan yang diambil berdasarkan PN ditambah 2 digit terakhir gang code mandor ditambah 1 digit terakhir gang code mandor.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-karyawans-kemandoran"
);

const params = {
    "gangcode": "MD011",
    "sectionname": "AFD-01",
    "fcba": "MTE",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-karyawans-kemandoran';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'gangcode' => 'MD011',
            'sectionname' => 'AFD-01',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (401):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated"
}

Request      

GET api/master/sips-karyawans-kemandoran

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

gangcode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Karyawan per Kemandoran berdasarkan kode gang. Example: MD011

sectionname   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Karyawan per Kemandoran berdasarkan afdeling. Example: AFD-01

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Karyawan per Kemandoran berdasarkan bisnis unit atau FCBA. Example: MTE

Data Kendaraan dari SIPS Production

requires authentication

Digunakan untuk inisialisasi data Kendaraan pada SIPS Mobile untuk mencari data kendaraan untuk pengangkutan panen. Tetapi jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, buatlah parameter pada Url berdasarkan Query Parameter

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-kendaraan"
);

const params = {
    "fccode": "DT70",
    "fcname": "Dump Truck 70",
    "vehiclegroupcode": "DT atau grup kendaraan lebih dari 1 maka nilai 1 dan 2 dst dipisah oleh koma ',' ikuti format ini DT,TR,MB untuk mencari kendaraan dengan kode grup kendaraan DT atau TR ATAU MB",
    "registrationno": "L9577BZ",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-kendaraan';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'fccode' => 'DT70',
            'fcname' => 'Dump Truck 70',
            'vehiclegroupcode' => 'DT atau grup kendaraan lebih dari 1 maka nilai 1 dan 2 dst dipisah oleh koma ',' ikuti format ini DT,TR,MB untuk mencari kendaraan dengan kode grup kendaraan DT atau TR ATAU MB',
            'registrationno' => 'L9577BZ',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (401):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *

}

Request      

GET api/master/sips-kendaraan

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

fccode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Kendaraan berdasarkan kode kendaraan. Example: DT70

fcname   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Kendaraan berdasarkan nama kendaraan. Example: Dump Truck 70

vehiclegroupcode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Kendaraan berdasarkan kode grup kendaraan. Example: DT atau grup kendaraan lebih dari 1 maka nilai 1 dan 2 dst dipisah oleh koma ',' ikuti format ini DT,TR,MB untuk mencari kendaraan dengan kode grup kendaraan DT atau TR ATAU MB

registrationno   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Kendaraan berdasarkan plat nomor kendaraan tanpa spasi. Example: L9577BZ

Data Business Unit dari SIPS Production

requires authentication

Digunakan untuk inisialisasi data Business Unit pada SIPS Mobile untuk mencari data Business Unit untuk pengangkutan panen. Tetapi jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, buatlah parameter pada Url berdasarkan Query Parameter

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-businessunit"
);

const params = {
    "fccode": "MTE",
    "fcname": "Mutiara Estate",
    "fccompanycode": "PT.SKJ",
    "fctype": "E",
    "central": "N",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/sips-businessunit';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'fccode' => 'MTE',
            'fcname' => 'Mutiara Estate',
            'fccompanycode' => 'PT.SKJ',
            'fctype' => 'E',
            'central' => 'N',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

GET api/master/sips-businessunit

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

fccode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Business Unit berdasarkan kode Business Unit. Example: MTE

fcname   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Business Unit berdasarkan nama Business Unit. Example: Mutiara Estate

fccompanycode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Business Unit berdasarkan kode grup Business Unit. Example: PT.SKJ

fctype   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Business Unit berdasarkan type Business Unit (E : Estate, M : Mill / Pabrik, HO : Head Office, W : Workshop). Example: E

central   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Business Unit berdasarkan posisi Business Unit apakah Central (Y) atau tidak (N). Example: N

Headers

Maps Geo JSON

Sub Group API untuk mengelola data Map GeoJSON

Memanggil data Map GeoJSON dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data Map GeoJSON secara keseluruhan. Tetapi jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, buatlah parameter pada Url berdasarkan Query Parameter. data ini diurutkan berdasarkan type_map.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/maps"
);

const params = {
    "type_map": "JALAN",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/maps';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'type_map' => 'JALAN',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Maps retrieved successfully",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "geojson": {
                "type": "FeatureCollection",
                "features": []
            },
            "type_map": "JALAN",
            "created_by": 1,
            "updated_by": 1,
            "created_at": "2026-01-29T14:30:00.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2026-01-29T14:30:00.000000Z",
            "creator": {
                "id": 1,
                "name": "John Doe",
                "email": "john@example.com"
            },
            "updater": {
                "id": 1,
                "name": "John Doe",
                "email": "john@example.com"
            }
        }
    ]
}

Example response (500):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Failed to retrieve maps",
    "error": "Database connection failed"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/master/maps

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

type_map   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Maps by type (JALAN, BLOK, ANCAK). Example: JALAN

Menyimpan data Map GeoJSON ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/maps"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('geojson_data[type]', 'FeatureCollection');
body.append('type_map', 'JALAN');
body.append('geojson', document.querySelector('input[name="geojson"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/maps';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'geojson_data[type]',
                'contents' => 'FeatureCollection'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'type_map',
                'contents' => 'JALAN'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'geojson',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php14C0.tmp', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Map created successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "geojson": {
            "type": "FeatureCollection",
            "features": []
        },
        "type_map": "JALAN",
        "created_by": 1,
        "updated_by": 1,
        "created_at": "2026-01-29T14:30:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-01-29T14:30:00.000000Z"
    }
}

Example response (422):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Validation failed",
    "errors": {
        "geojson": [
            "Either geojson file or geojson_data is required."
        ],
        "type_map": [
            "The type_map field is required and must be one of: JALAN, BLOK, ANCAK."
        ]
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/master/maps

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

geojson   file  optional  

optional The GeoJSON file to upload. Must be a valid JSON file. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php14C0.tmp

geojson_data   object  optional  

optional The GeoJSON data structure (alternative to file upload).
type   string  optional  

required_with:geojson_data The GeoJSON type. Example: FeatureCollection

features   string[]  optional  

required_with:geojson_data Array of GeoJSON features.

type_map   string   

Map type identifier. Must be one of: JALAN, BLOK, ANCAK. Example: JALAN

Menampilkan data Map Geojson berdasarkan id Map Geojson dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/maps/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/maps/1';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Map retrieved successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "geojson": {
            "type": "FeatureCollection",
            "features": []
        },
        "type_map": "JALAN",
        "created_by": 1,
        "updated_by": 1,
        "created_at": "2026-01-29T14:30:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-01-29T14:30:00.000000Z",
        "creator": {
            "id": 1,
            "name": "John Doe",
            "email": "john@example.com"
        },
        "updater": {
            "id": 1,
            "name": "John Doe",
            "email": "john@example.com"
        }
    }
}

Example response (404):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Map not found"
}

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

Request      

GET api/master/maps/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

The ID of the map. Example: 1

Mengubah data Map Geojson berdasarkan id Map Geojson.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/maps/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('geojson_data[type]', 'FeatureCollection');
body.append('type_map', 'JALAN');
body.append('geojson', document.querySelector('input[name="geojson"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/maps/1';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'geojson_data[type]',
                'contents' => 'FeatureCollection'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'type_map',
                'contents' => 'JALAN'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'geojson',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php14D1.tmp', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Map updated successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "geojson": {
            "type": "FeatureCollection",
            "features": []
        },
        "type_map": "JALAN",
        "updated_by": 1,
        "updated_at": "2026-01-29T15:00:00.000000Z"
    }
}

Example response (404):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Map not found"
}

Example response (422):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Validation failed",
    "errors": {
        "type_map": [
            "The type_map must be one of: JALAN, BLOK, ANCAK."
        ]
    }
}

Request      

PUT api/master/maps/{id}

PATCH api/master/maps/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

The ID of the map to update. Example: 1

Body Parameters

geojson   file  optional  

optional The GeoJSON file to upload. Must be a valid JSON file. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php14D1.tmp

geojson_data   object  optional  

optional The GeoJSON data structure (alternative to file upload).
type   string  optional  

required_with:geojson_data The GeoJSON type. Example: FeatureCollection

features   string[]  optional  

required_with:geojson_data Array of GeoJSON features.

type_map   string  optional  

optional Map type identifier. Must be one of: JALAN, BLOK, ANCAK. Example: JALAN

Menghapus data Map Geojson berdasarkan id Map Geojson.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/maps/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/master/maps/1';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Map deleted successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "geojson": {
            "type": "FeatureCollection",
            "features": []
        },
        "type_map": "JALAN"
    }
}

Example response (404):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Map not found"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

DELETE api/master/maps/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

The ID of the map to delete. Example: 1

Apps

Karyawan

Sub Group untuk Karyawan

Memanggil data karyawan dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data karyawan secara keseluruhan. Tetapi jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, buatlah parameter pada Url berdasarkan Query Parameter

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/karyawans"
);

const params = {
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "sectionname": "AFD-01",
    "gangcode": "PN011",
    "noancak": "1",
    "fctype": "W",
    "fccompanycode": "PT.SKJ",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/karyawans';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'sectionname' => 'AFD-01',
            'gangcode' => 'PN011',
            'noancak' => '1',
            'fctype' => 'W',
            'fccompanycode' => 'PT.SKJ',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "List Data Karyawan",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 2447,
            "fccode": "06-011128-240520-0642",
            "fcname": "RANDIANUS SERAN",
            "sectionname": "AFD-01",
            "gangcode": "PN011",
            "fcba": "MTE",
            "noancak": "1",
            "created_by": null,
            "updated_by": null,
            "created_at": null,
            "updated_at": null,
            "fctype": "W",
            "fccompanycode": "PT.SKJ"
        }
    ]
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/apps/karyawans

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter karyawan berdasarkan fcba. Example: MTE

sectionname   string  optional  

Optional. Filter karyawan berdasarkan sectionname. Example: AFD-01

gangcode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter karyawan berdasarkan gangcode. Example: PN011

noancak   string  optional  

Optional. Filter karyawan berdasarkan noancak. Example: 1

fctype   string  optional  

Optional. Filter karyawan berdasarkan fctype. Example: W

fccompanycode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter karyawan berdasarkan fccompanycode. Example: PT.SKJ

Menyimpan data karyawan ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/karyawans"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('fccode', 'facere');
body.append('fcname', 'earum');
body.append('sectionname', 'npdskmaneuxmsjtfqtpsdyaij');
body.append('gangcode', 'zystqyogxsdhjffupl');
body.append('fcba', 'aliquid');
body.append('noancak', 'nulla');
body.append('fr_registered_at', '2026-06-11T10:47:24');
body.append('photo', document.querySelector('input[name="photo"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/karyawans';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'fccode',
                'contents' => 'facere'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fcname',
                'contents' => 'earum'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'sectionname',
                'contents' => 'npdskmaneuxmsjtfqtpsdyaij'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'gangcode',
                'contents' => 'zystqyogxsdhjffupl'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fcba',
                'contents' => 'aliquid'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'noancak',
                'contents' => 'nulla'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fr_registered_at',
                'contents' => '2026-06-11T10:47:24'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'photo',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php15AD.tmp', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/apps/karyawans

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

fccode   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the sips_production.Employee table. Example: facere

fcname   string   

The fcname of an existing record in the sips_production.Employee table. Example: earum

sectionname   string   

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: npdskmaneuxmsjtfqtpsdyaij

gangcode   string   

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: zystqyogxsdhjffupl

fcba   string   

The fcba of an existing record in the sips_production.Employee table. Example: aliquid

noancak   string  optional  

Example: nulla

photo   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php15AD.tmp

created_by   string  optional  
updated_by   string  optional  
face_recognition   string  optional  
fr_registered_at   string  optional  

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-11T10:47:24

Menampilkan data karyawan berdasarkan id karyawan dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/karyawans/14"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/karyawans/14';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/karyawans/11"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('fccode', 'vero');
body.append('fcname', 'labore');
body.append('sectionname', 'ocfimlsw');
body.append('gangcode', 'ectlfpfk');
body.append('fcba', 'eius');
body.append('noancak', 'nemo');
body.append('fr_registered_at', '2026-06-11T10:47:24');
body.append('aktif', 'debitis');
body.append('photo', document.querySelector('input[name="photo"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/karyawans/11';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'fccode',
                'contents' => 'vero'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fcname',
                'contents' => 'labore'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'sectionname',
                'contents' => 'ocfimlsw'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'gangcode',
                'contents' => 'ectlfpfk'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fcba',
                'contents' => 'eius'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'noancak',
                'contents' => 'nemo'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fr_registered_at',
                'contents' => '2026-06-11T10:47:24'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'aktif',
                'contents' => 'debitis'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'photo',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php161C.tmp', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Karyawan. Example: 11

Body Parameters

fccode   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the sips_production.Employee table. Example: vero

fcname   string   

The fcname of an existing record in the sips_production.Employee table. Example: labore

sectionname   string   

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: ocfimlsw

gangcode   string   

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: ectlfpfk

fcba   string   

The fcba of an existing record in the sips_production.Employee table. Example: eius

noancak   string   

Example: nemo

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-11T10:47:24

Example: debitis

photo   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php161C.tmp

updated_by   string  optional

TPH

Sub Group untuk TPH

Memanggil data TPH dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data TPH secara keseluruhan. Tetapi jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, buatlah parameter pada Url berdasarkan Query Parameter

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/tphs"
);

const params = {
    "notph": "1",
    "fieldcode": "A01A",
    "ancakno": "1A",
    "typetph": "1",
    "status": "TRUE",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-04",
    "ha": "2",
    "tahuntanam": "2009",
    "bjr": "3.8",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/tphs';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'notph' => '1',
            'fieldcode' => 'A01A',
            'ancakno' => '1A',
            'typetph' => '1',
            'status' => 'TRUE',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-04',
            'ha' => '2',
            'tahuntanam' => '2009',
            'bjr' => '3.8',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "List Data TPH",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": "1",
            "notph": "1",
            "fieldcode": "A01A",
            "ancakno": "1A",
            "typetph": "1",
            "status": "TRUE",
            "location": "2.334993396214831, 117.95918991166465",
            "fcba": "MTE",
            "division": "AFD-04",
            "ha": "2",
            "tahuntanam": "2009",
            "bjr": "3.8"
        }
    ]
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/apps/tphs

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

notph   string  optional  

Optional. Filter TPH berdasarkan notph. Example: 1

fieldcode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter TPH berdasarkan fieldcode. Example: A01A

ancakno   string  optional  

Optional. Filter TPH berdasarkan ancakno. Example: 1A

typetph   integer  optional  

Optional. Filter TPH berdasarkan typetph 1. Normal TPH; 2. Sharing TPH; 3. Temporary TPH (didalam blok); 4. Pooling TPH (tempat kumpul TBS Double Handling). Example: 1

status   string  optional  

Optional. Filter TPH berdasarkan status. Example: TRUE

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter TPH berdasarkan fcba. Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter TPH berdasarkan afdeling. Example: AFD-04

ha   string  optional  

Optional. Filter TPH berdasarkan ha. Example: 2

tahuntanam   string  optional  

Optional. Filter TPH berdasarkan tahuntanam. Example: 2009

bjr   string  optional  

Optional. Filter TPH berdasarkan bjr. Example: 3.8

Menyimpan data TPH.

requires authentication

Jika kombinasi notph + blok + afdeling + fcba sudah ada, maka hanya update: location, ancakno, tahuntanam, bjr.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/tphs"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "notph": "voluptatibus",
    "fieldcode": "dolores",
    "ancakno": "voluptas",
    "fcba": "et",
    "afdeling": "animi",
    "typetph": 14,
    "status": "est",
    "ha": 1.266694515,
    "tahuntanam": 11,
    "bjr": 8367.29
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/tphs';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'notph' => 'voluptatibus',
            'fieldcode' => 'dolores',
            'ancakno' => 'voluptas',
            'fcba' => 'et',
            'afdeling' => 'animi',
            'typetph' => 14,
            'status' => 'est',
            'ha' => 1.266694515,
            'tahuntanam' => 11,
            'bjr' => 8367.29,
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/apps/tphs

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

notph   string   

Example: voluptatibus

fieldcode   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: dolores

ancakno   string   

Example: voluptas

fcba   string   

The fcba of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: et

afdeling   string   

The division of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: animi

typetph   integer   

Example: 14

status   string   

Example: est

location   string  optional  
ha   number   

Example: 1.266694515

tahuntanam   integer  optional  

Example: 11

bjr   number  optional  

Example: 8367.29

created_by   string  optional  

Menampilkan data TPH berdasarkan id TPH dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(

);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/tphs/2';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

GET api/apps/tphs/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID TPH. Example: 2

Mengubah data TPH berdasarkan id TPH.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/tphs/4"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "notph": "beatae",
    "fieldcode": "suscipit",
    "ancakno": "vero",
    "fcba": "temporibus",
    "afdeling": "explicabo",
    "typetph": "ut",
    "status": "ex",
    "ha": 618.376,
    "tahuntanam": 1,
    "bjr": 3
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/tphs/4';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'notph' => 'beatae',
            'fieldcode' => 'suscipit',
            'ancakno' => 'vero',
            'fcba' => 'temporibus',
            'afdeling' => 'explicabo',
            'typetph' => 'ut',
            'status' => 'ex',
            'ha' => 618.376,
            'tahuntanam' => 1,
            'bjr' => 3.0,
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

PUT api/apps/tphs/{id}

PATCH api/apps/tphs/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID TPH. Example: 4

Body Parameters

notph   string   

Example: beatae

fieldcode   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: suscipit

ancakno   string   

Example: vero

fcba   string   

The fcba of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: temporibus

afdeling   string   

The division of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: explicabo

typetph   string   

Example: ut

status   string   

Example: ex

location   string  optional  
ha   number   

Example: 618.376

tahuntanam   integer  optional  

Example: 1

bjr   number  optional  

Example: 3

updated_by   string  optional  

Menghapus data TPH berdasarkan id TPH.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/tphs/17"
);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/tphs/17';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

DELETE api/apps/tphs/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID TPH. Example: 17

Ancak

Sub Group untuk Ancak Management (Sub dari TPH)

Memanggil data ancak dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data ancak secara keseluruhan dengan dukungan filter dan pencarian. Setiap ancak merupakan sub-unit dari TPH dan memiliki informasi luas tanah. Data diurutkan berdasarkan FCBA, Afdeling, dan Nomor Ancak.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/ancaks"
);

const params = {
    "q": "1A",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "fieldcode": "A01A",
    "noancak": "1A",
    "status": "active",
    "tph_id": "1",
    "per_page": "10",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/ancaks';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'q' => '1A',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'fieldcode' => 'A01A',
            'noancak' => '1A',
            'status' => 'active',
            'tph_id' => '1',
            'per_page' => '10',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "List Data Ancak",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "fcba": "MTE",
            "afdeling": "AFD-01",
            "fieldcode": "A01A",
            "noancak": "1A",
            "luas": "25.50",
            "tph_id": 5,
            "tph": null,
            "status": "active",
            "notes": "Ancak untuk panen reguler",
            "created_by": "admin",
            "updated_by": "admin",
            "created_at": "2025-12-12T10:00:00+08:00",
            "updated_at": "2025-12-12T10:00:00+08:00"
        }
    ],
    "meta": {
        "current_page": 1,
        "from": 1,
        "last_page": 1,
        "per_page": 15,
        "to": 1,
        "total": 1
    }
}

Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/apps/ancaks

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

q   string  optional  

Optional. Search ancak berdasarkan noancak, fieldcode, atau afdeling. Example: 1A

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter ancak berdasarkan fcba. Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter ancak berdasarkan afdeling. Example: AFD-01

fieldcode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter ancak berdasarkan fieldcode. Example: A01A

noancak   string  optional  

Optional. Filter ancak berdasarkan nomor ancak. Example: 1A

status   string  optional  

Optional. Filter ancak berdasarkan status (active/inactive/suspended). Example: active

tph_id   integer  optional  

Optional. Filter ancak berdasarkan TPH ID. Example: 1

per_page   integer  optional  

Optional. Jumlah data per halaman. Default: 15. Example: 10

Menyimpan data ancak ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/ancaks"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "fieldcode": "A01A",
    "noancak": "1A",
    "luas": 25.5,
    "tph_id": 5,
    "status": "active",
    "notes": "Ancak untuk panen reguler",
    "created_by": "admin"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/ancaks';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'fieldcode' => 'A01A',
            'noancak' => '1A',
            'luas' => 25.5,
            'tph_id' => 5,
            'status' => 'active',
            'notes' => 'Ancak untuk panen reguler',
            'created_by' => 'admin',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (201, success):

    "success": true,
    "message": "Data Ancak berhasil ditambahkan.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "fcba": "MTE",
        "afdeling": "AFD-01",
        "fieldcode": "A01A",
        "noancak": "1A",
        "luas": "25.50",
        "tph_id": 5,
        "tph": null,
        "status": "active",
        "notes": "Ancak untuk panen reguler",

        "updated_by": null,

        "updated_at": "2025-12-12T10:00:00+08:00"

}

Request      

POST api/apps/ancaks

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

fcba   string  optional  

optional Kode FCBA. Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

optional Kode afdeling/divisi. Example: AFD-01

fieldcode   string  optional  

optional Kode lapangan. Example: A01A

noancak   string   

Nomor ancak (unik). Example: 1A

luas   number  optional  

optional Luas ancak dalam hektar. Example: 25.5

tph_id   integer  optional  

optional ID TPH yang terkait. Example: 5

status   string  optional  

optional Status ancak (active/inactive/suspended). Default: active. Example: active

notes   string  optional  

optional Catatan tambahan. Example: Ancak untuk panen reguler

created_by   string  optional  

optional Nama user yang membuat. Example: admin

Menampilkan data ancak berdasarkan id ancak.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/ancaks/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/ancaks/1';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

requires authentication

Request      

PUT api/apps/ancaks/{id}

PATCH api/apps/ancaks/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Ancak. Example: 1

Body Parameters

fcba   string  optional  

optional Kode FCBA. Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

optional Kode afdeling/divisi. Example: AFD-01

fieldcode   string  optional  

optional Kode lapangan. Example: A01A

noancak   string  optional  

optional Nomor ancak (unik). Example: 1A

luas   number  optional  

optional Luas ancak dalam hektar. Example: 25.5

tph_id   integer  optional  

optional ID TPH yang terkait. Example: 5

status   string  optional  

optional Status ancak. Example: active

notes   string  optional  

optional Catatan tambahan. Example: Updated

updated_by   string  optional  

optional Nama user yang mengupdate. Example: admin

Menghapus data ancak berdasarkan id ancak.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/ancaks/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/ancaks/1';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

DELETE api/apps/ancaks/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Ancak. Example: 1

Absensi

Sub Group untuk Absensi

Memanggil data Absensi dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data ABSENSI secara keseluruhan. Tetapi jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, buatlah parameter pada Url berdasarkan Query Parameter. data ini diurutkan berdasarkan Bisnis Unit, Tanggal terbaru, Afdeling dan Kode Karyawan

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis"
);

const params = {
    "tanggal": "2025-08-17",
    "tanggal_end": "2025-08-20",
    "kode_karyawan_mandor": "06-851012-151218-0079",
    "kode_karyawan": "06-031014-231025-0438",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "gang": "PN011",
    "attendance": "KJ",
    "status_attendance": "Planned",
    "attendance_type": "REGULAR",
    "fcba_destination": "MRE",
    "section_destination": "AFD-01",
    "kemandoran": "MD011",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'tanggal' => '2025-08-17',
            'tanggal_end' => '2025-08-20',
            'kode_karyawan_mandor' => '06-851012-151218-0079',
            'kode_karyawan' => '06-031014-231025-0438',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'gang' => 'PN011',
            'attendance' => 'KJ',
            'status_attendance' => 'Planned',
            'attendance_type' => 'REGULAR',
            'fcba_destination' => 'MRE',
            'section_destination' => 'AFD-01',
            'kemandoran' => 'MD011',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "List Data Absensi",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": "25",
            "tanggal": "2024-12-19 00:00:00",
            "time_in": "2024-12-19 06:00:31",
            "location_in": "2024-12-19 06:00:31",
            "time_out": "2024-12-19 17:44:31",
            "location_out": "2024-12-19 17:44:31",
            "kode_karyawan_mandor": "06-851012-151218-0079",
            "namamandor": "SAMSUL",
            "kode_karyawan": "06-031014-231025-0438",
            "namakaryawan": "HENDRIKUS KLAU SERAN",
            "pengancakan": "MTE",
            "total_late_time": "01:11",
            "go_home_early": "00:10",
            "attendance_type": "REGULAR",
            "exception_case": "",
            "no_ba_exca": "",
            "fcba": "MTE",
            "section": "AFD-01",
            "gang": "PN011",
            "attendance": "KJ",
            "mandays": 0.82,
            "status_attendance": "Planned",
            "fcba_destination": "MRE",
            "section_destination": "AFD-01",
            "kemandoran": "MD011",
            "image": "",
            "id_device": "",
            "mac_address": ""
        }
    ]
}
