Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/apps/absensis

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

tanggal   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan tanggal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-08-17

tanggal_end   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan rentang tanggal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-08-20

kode_karyawan_mandor   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan kode_karyawan_mandor. Example: 06-851012-151218-0079

kode_karyawan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan kode_karyawan. Example: 06-031014-231025-0438

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan fcba. Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan afdeling. Example: AFD-01

gang   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan gang. Example: PN011

attendance   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan attendance. Example: KJ

status_attendance   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan status kehadiran salah satu dari Planned, AuthorizedOnProgress, Approved, Reject. Example: Planned

attendance_type   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan type kehadiran salah satu dari REGULAR, ASSISTENSI. Example: REGULAR

fcba_destination   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan fcba_destination. Example: MRE

section_destination   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan section_destination. Example: AFD-01

kemandoran   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Absensi berdasarkan kemandoran. Example: MD011

Menyimpan data Absensi ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('tanggal', '2026-06-11');
body.append('kode_karyawan', 'et');
body.append('time_in', '2026-06-11 10:47:24');
body.append('time_out', '2026-06-11 10:47:24');
body.append('total_late_time', '10:47');
body.append('go_home_early', '10:47');
body.append('attendance_type', 'ASSISTENSI');
body.append('fcba', 'laboriosam');
body.append('mandays', '1');
body.append('attendance', 'ML');
body.append('no_ba_exca', document.querySelector('input[name="no_ba_exca"]').files[0]);
body.append('images', document.querySelector('input[name="images"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'tanggal',
                'contents' => '2026-06-11'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'kode_karyawan',
                'contents' => 'et'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'time_in',
                'contents' => '2026-06-11 10:47:24'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'time_out',
                'contents' => '2026-06-11 10:47:24'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'total_late_time',
                'contents' => '10:47'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'go_home_early',
                'contents' => '10:47'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'attendance_type',
                'contents' => 'ASSISTENSI'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fcba',
                'contents' => 'laboriosam'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'mandays',
                'contents' => '1'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'attendance',
                'contents' => 'ML'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'no_ba_exca',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php163C.tmp', 'r')
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'images',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php163D.tmp', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/apps/absensis

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

tanggal   string   

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d. Example: 2026-06-11

kode_karyawan_mandor   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table.

kode_karyawan   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: et

time_in   string   

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d H:i:s. Example: 2026-06-11 10:47:24

time_out   string  optional  

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d H:i:s. Example: 2026-06-11 10:47:24

location_in   string  optional  
location_out   string  optional  

'location_in' => 'required',.

pengancakan   string  optional  
total_late_time   string  optional  

Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 10:47

go_home_early   string  optional  

Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 10:47

attendance_type   string  optional  

Example: ASSISTENSI

Must be one of:
  • REGULAR
  • ASSISTENSI
exception_case   string  optional  
no_ba_exca   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php163C.tmp

fcba   string   

The fcba of an existing record in the employee table. Example: laboriosam

section   string  optional  

The sectionname of an existing record in the employee table.

gang   string  optional  

The gangcode of an existing record in the employee table.

mandays   number  optional  

Must not be greater than 1. Example: 1

attendance   string   

Example: ML

Must be one of:
  • KJ
  • WH
  • WS
  • MK
  • ML
  • P1
  • KB
  • OT
fcba_destination   string  optional  

The fcba of an existing record in the employee table.

section_destination   string  optional  

The sectionname of an existing record in the employee table.

kemandoran   string  optional  

The gangcode of an existing record in the users table.

id_device   string  optional  
mac_address   string  optional  
images   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php163D.tmp

created_by   string  optional  

Menampilkan data Absensi berdasarkan id Absensi dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis/20"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis/20';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Absensi. Example: 20

Mengubah data Absensi berdasarkan id Absensi.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis/19"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('kode_karyawan', 'nostrum');
body.append('attendance_type', 'ASSISTENSI');
body.append('time_out', '2026-06-11 10:47:24');
body.append('total_late_time', '10:47');
body.append('go_home_early', '10:47');
body.append('fcba', 'excepturi');
body.append('mandays', '1');
body.append('attendance', 'WH');
body.append('images', document.querySelector('input[name="images"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis/19';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'kode_karyawan',
                'contents' => 'nostrum'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'attendance_type',
                'contents' => 'ASSISTENSI'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'time_out',
                'contents' => '2026-06-11 10:47:24'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'total_late_time',
                'contents' => '10:47'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'go_home_early',
                'contents' => '10:47'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fcba',
                'contents' => 'excepturi'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'mandays',
                'contents' => '1'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'attendance',
                'contents' => 'WH'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'images',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php168C.tmp', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

id   integer

Body Parameters

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table.

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: nostrum

attendance_type   string  optional  

Example: ASSISTENSI

Must be one of:
  • REGULAR
  • ASSISTENSI
time_out   string  optional  

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d H:i:s. Example: 2026-06-11 10:47:24

location_out   string  optional  
pengancakan   string  optional  
total_late_time   string  optional  

Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 10:47

Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 10:47

no_ba_exca   string  optional  
fcba   string   

The fcba of an existing record in the employee table. Example: excepturi

section   string  optional  

The sectionname of an existing record in the employee table.

gang   string  optional  

The gangcode of an existing record in the employee table.

mandays   number  optional  

Must not be greater than 1. Example: 1

Example: WH

Must be one of:
  • KJ

  • WS
  • MK

  • KB
  • OT

Menghapus data Absensi berdasarkan id Absensi.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis/1';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

DELETE api/apps/absensis/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Absensi. Example: 1

Approved atau Reject status_absensi (STATUS_ATTENDANCE) berdasarkan id Absensi.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis/11/status"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "status_attendance": "Planned"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/absensis/11/status';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'status_attendance' => 'Planned',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

PATCH api/apps/absensis/{id}/status

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Absensi. Example: 11

Body Parameters

status_attendance   string   

Example: Planned

Must be one of:
  • Planned
  • Reject
  • Approved

Panen

Sub Group untuk Panen

Memanggil data Panen dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data Panen secara keseluruhan. Namun, jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, gunakan parameter pada URL berdasarkan Query Parameter. Data diurutkan berdasarkan Tanggal terbaru, Bisnit Unit, Afdeling, dan Kode Karyawan.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens"
);

const params = {
    "nodokumen": "SKJ-HOF/MTE/25/01/0001",
    "tanggal": "2025-11-01",
    "tanggal_end": "2025-11-20",
    "kode_karyawan": "06-031014-231025-0438",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "tph": "TPH-101",
    "kemandoran": "MD011",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'nodokumen' => 'SKJ-HOF/MTE/25/01/0001',
            'tanggal' => '2025-11-01',
            'tanggal_end' => '2025-11-20',
            'kode_karyawan' => '06-031014-231025-0438',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'tph' => 'TPH-101',
            'kemandoran' => 'MD011',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "List Data Panen",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": "1",
            "nodokumen": "SKJ-HOF/MTE/25/01/0001",
            "tanggal": "2024-12-19",
            "kode_karyawan": "06-031014-231025-0438",
            "nama_karyawan": "HENDRIKUS KLAU SERAN",
            "fcba": "MTE",
            "afdeling": "AFD-01",
            "tph": "TPH-101",
            "fieldcode": "A12",
            "output": "150",
            "mentah": "5",
            "overripe": "3",
            "busuk": "2",
            "busuk2": "0",
            "buahkecil": "1",
            "brondol": "8",
            "alasbrondol": "0",
            "tangkai_panjang": "0",
            "kemandoran": "MD011",
            "images": "",
            "exception_case": "",
            "no_ba_exca": "",
            "id_device": "Xiaomi",
            "status_harvesting": "Planned",
            "card_id": "NFC 1234567890"
        }
    ]
}

Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/apps/panens

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

nodokumen   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Panen berdasarkan No Dokumen. Example: SKJ-HOF/MTE/25/01/0001

tanggal   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Panen berdasarkan tanggal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-01

tanggal_end   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Panen berdasarkan rentang tanggal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-20

kode_karyawan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Panen berdasarkan kode karyawan. Example: 06-031014-231025-0438

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Panen berdasarkan bisnis unit. Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Panen berdasarkan afdeling. Example: AFD-01

tph   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Panen berdasarkan TPH. Example: TPH-101

kemandoran   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Panen berdasarkan kemandoran. Example: MD011

Menyimpan data Panen ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('nodokumen', 'consequuntur');
body.append('tanggal', '2026-06-11');
body.append('kode_karyawan_mandor1', 'ab');
body.append('kode_karyawan_mandor_panen', 'hic');
body.append('kode_karyawan_kerani', 'earum');
body.append('kode_karyawan', 'qui');
body.append('noancak', 'maxime');
body.append('tph', 'ratione');
body.append('fieldcode', 'eveniet');
body.append('afdeling', 'ut');
body.append('fcba', 'magnam');
body.append('output', '1');
body.append('mentah', '65');
body.append('overripe', '65');
body.append('busuk', '57');
body.append('busuk2', '59');
body.append('buahkecil', '17');
body.append('parteno', '88');
body.append('parteno50plus', '16');
body.append('brondol', '7');
body.append('tangkaipanjang', '33');
body.append('alasbrondol', 'ut');
body.append('images', document.querySelector('input[name="images"]').files[0]);
body.append('no_ba_exca', document.querySelector('input[name="no_ba_exca"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'nodokumen',
                'contents' => 'consequuntur'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'tanggal',
                'contents' => '2026-06-11'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'kode_karyawan_mandor1',
                'contents' => 'ab'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'kode_karyawan_mandor_panen',
                'contents' => 'hic'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'kode_karyawan_kerani',
                'contents' => 'earum'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'kode_karyawan',
                'contents' => 'qui'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'noancak',
                'contents' => 'maxime'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'tph',
                'contents' => 'ratione'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fieldcode',
                'contents' => 'eveniet'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'afdeling',
                'contents' => 'ut'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fcba',
                'contents' => 'magnam'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'output',
                'contents' => '1'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'mentah',
                'contents' => '65'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'overripe',
                'contents' => '65'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'busuk',
                'contents' => '57'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'busuk2',
                'contents' => '59'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'buahkecil',
                'contents' => '17'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'parteno',
                'contents' => '88'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'parteno50plus',
                'contents' => '16'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'brondol',
                'contents' => '7'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'tangkaipanjang',
                'contents' => '33'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'alasbrondol',
                'contents' => 'ut'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'images',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php16AC.tmp', 'r')
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'no_ba_exca',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php16BD.tmp', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

POST api/apps/panens

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

nodokumen   string   

Example: consequuntur

tanggal   string   

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d. Example: 2026-06-11

kode_karyawan_mandor1   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: ab

kode_karyawan_mandor_panen   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: hic

kode_karyawan_kerani   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: earum

kode_karyawan   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: qui

noancak   string   

Example: maxime

tph   string   

'noancak' => 'required|string|exists:tph,ancakno',. Example: ratione

fieldcode   string   

'tph' => 'required|string|exists:tph,notph',. Example: eveniet

afdeling   string   

'fieldcode' => 'required|string|exists:tph,fieldcode',. Example: ut

fcba   string   

'afdeling' => 'required|string|exists:tph,afdeling',. Example: magnam

output   integer   

'fcba' => 'required|string|exists:tph,fcba',. Must be at least 0. Example: 1

mentah   integer  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 65

overripe   integer  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 65

busuk   integer  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 57

busuk2   integer  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 59

buahkecil   integer  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 17

parteno   integer  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 88

parteno50plus   integer  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 16

brondol   integer  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 7

tangkaipanjang   integer  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 33

alasbrondol   string  optional  

Example: ut

status_assistensi   string  optional  
kemandoran   string  optional  

The gangcode of an existing record in the users table.

location   string  optional  
images   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php16AC.tmp

exception_case   string  optional  
no_ba_exca   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php16BD.tmp

id_device   string  optional  
card_id   string  optional  
created_by   string  optional  

Menampilkan data Panen berdasarkan id Panen dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens/9"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens/9';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *

    "message": "Unauthenticated"
}

Request      

GET api/apps/panens/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Panen. Example: 9

Mengubah data Panen berdasarkan id Panen.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens/17"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('kode_karyawan_mandor1', 'est');
body.append('kode_karyawan_mandor_panen', 'a');
body.append('kode_karyawan_kerani', 'quaerat');
body.append('kode_karyawan', 'doloribus');
body.append('noancak', 'facilis');
body.append('tph', 'et');
body.append('fieldcode', 'dicta');
body.append('afdeling', 'magni');
body.append('fcba', 'minima');
body.append('output', '25');
body.append('mentah', '90');
body.append('overripe', '26');
body.append('busuk', '54');
body.append('busuk2', '10');
body.append('buahkecil', '58');
body.append('parteno', '4');
body.append('parteno50plus', '16');
body.append('brondol', '49');
body.append('tangkaipanjang', '54');
body.append('alasbrondol', 'aut');
body.append('no_ba_exca', document.querySelector('input[name="no_ba_exca"]').files[0]);
body.append('images', document.querySelector('input[name="images"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens/17';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'kode_karyawan_mandor1',
                'contents' => 'est'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'kode_karyawan_mandor_panen',
                'contents' => 'a'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'kode_karyawan_kerani',
                'contents' => 'quaerat'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'kode_karyawan',
                'contents' => 'doloribus'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'noancak',
                'contents' => 'facilis'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'tph',
                'contents' => 'et'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fieldcode',
                'contents' => 'dicta'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'afdeling',
                'contents' => 'magni'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'fcba',
                'contents' => 'minima'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'output',
                'contents' => '25'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'mentah',
                'contents' => '90'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'overripe',
                'contents' => '26'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'busuk',
                'contents' => '54'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'busuk2',
                'contents' => '10'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'buahkecil',
                'contents' => '58'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'parteno',
                'contents' => '4'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'parteno50plus',
                'contents' => '16'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'brondol',
                'contents' => '49'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'tangkaipanjang',
                'contents' => '54'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'alasbrondol',
                'contents' => 'aut'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'no_ba_exca',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php172B.tmp', 'r')
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'images',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php172C.tmp', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

PUT api/apps/panens/{id}

PATCH api/apps/panens/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Panen. Example: 17

Body Parameters

kode_karyawan_mandor1   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: est

kode_karyawan_mandor_panen   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: a

kode_karyawan_kerani   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: quaerat

kode_karyawan   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: doloribus

noancak   string   

'noancak' => 'required|string|exists:tph,ancakno', 'fieldcode' => 'required|string|exists:tph,fieldcode', 'tph' => 'required|string|exists:tph,notph',. Example: facilis

tph   string  optional  

Example: et

fieldcode   string   

Example: dicta

afdeling   string   

The afdeling of an existing record in the tph table. Example: magni

fcba   string   

The fcba of an existing record in the tph table. Example: minima

exception_case   string  optional  
no_ba_exca   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php172B.tmp

output   number   

Must be at least 0. Example: 25

mentah   number  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 90

overripe   number  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 26

busuk   number  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 54

busuk2   number  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 10

buahkecil   number  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 58

parteno   number  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 4

parteno50plus   number  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 16

brondol   number  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 49

tangkaipanjang   number  optional  

Must be at least 0. Example: 54

alasbrondol   string  optional  

Example: aut

status_assistensi   string  optional  

'kemandoran' => 'nullable|exists:users,gangcode',.

images   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php172C.tmp

Menghapus data Panen berdasarkan id Panen.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens/3"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens/3';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

Request      

DELETE api/apps/panens/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Panen. Example: 3

Approved atau Reject status_harvesting (STATUS_HARVESTING) berdasarkan id Harvesting.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens/5/status"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "status_harvesting": "Approved"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/panens/5/status';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'status_harvesting' => 'Approved',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PATCH api/apps/panens/{id}/status

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Harvesting. Example: 5

Body Parameters

status_harvesting   string   

Example: Approved

Must be one of:
  • Planned
  • Reject
  • Approved

Pengangkutan

Sub Group untuk Pengangkutan

Memanggil data Pengangkutan dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data Pengangkutan secara keseluruhan. Namun, jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, gunakan parameter pada URL berdasarkan Query Parameter. Data diurutkan berdasarkan Tanggal terbaru, Afdeling, dan Kode Karyawan.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans"
);

const params = {
    "nopengangkutan": "DRC2010101101",
    "nospb": "SPB2024001259",
    "nodokumen": "SKJ-HOF/MTE/25/11/0001",
    "tanggal": "2025-11-01",
    "tanggal_end": "2025-11-20",
    "kode_karyawan_kerani": "06-030922-240201-0531",
    "kode_karyawan_driver": "06-830717-190901-0112",
    "tkbm1": "06-830717-190901-0113",
    "tkbm2": "06-830717-190901-0114",
    "tkbm3": "06-830717-190901-0115",
    "tkbm4": "06-830717-190901-0116",
    "tkbm5": "06-830717-190901-0117",
    "type_pengangkutan": "1",
    "kode_kendaraan": "DT70",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "pabrik_tujuan": "DOM",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "tph": "1",
    "fieldcode": "A02",
    "status_pengangkutan": "Planned",
    "flag": "Y",
    "fcba_destination": "MTE",
    "afdeling_destination": "AFD-02",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'nopengangkutan' => 'DRC2010101101',
            'nospb' => 'SPB2024001259',
            'nodokumen' => 'SKJ-HOF/MTE/25/11/0001',
            'tanggal' => '2025-11-01',
            'tanggal_end' => '2025-11-20',
            'kode_karyawan_kerani' => '06-030922-240201-0531',
            'kode_karyawan_driver' => '06-830717-190901-0112',
            'tkbm1' => '06-830717-190901-0113',
            'tkbm2' => '06-830717-190901-0114',
            'tkbm3' => '06-830717-190901-0115',
            'tkbm4' => '06-830717-190901-0116',
            'tkbm5' => '06-830717-190901-0117',
            'type_pengangkutan' => '1',
            'kode_kendaraan' => 'DT70',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'pabrik_tujuan' => 'DOM',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'tph' => '1',
            'fieldcode' => 'A02',
            'status_pengangkutan' => 'Planned',
            'flag' => 'Y',
            'fcba_destination' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling_destination' => 'AFD-02',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "List Data Pengangkutan",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": "5",
            "nopengangkutan": "DRC2010101101",
            "nospb": "SPB2024001259",
            "nodokumen": "002",
            "tanggal": "2024-12-31 00:00:00",
            "kode_karyawan_kerani": "06-030922-240201-0531",
            "nama_karyawan_kerani": "LEONARDUS DIFAN ALFANTO",
            "kode_karyawan_driver": "06-830717-190901-0112",
            "nama_karyawan_driver": "NURSIDA",
            "tkbm1": "06-830717-190901-0113",
            "nama_tkbm1": "ANON",
            "tkbm2": "06-830717-190901-0114",
            "nama_tkbm2": "ONAN",
            "tkbm3": "06-830717-190901-0115",
            "nama_tkbm3": "JASU",
            "tkbm4": "06-830717-190901-0116",
            "nama_tkbm4": "BUJA",
            "tkbm5": "06-830717-190901-0117",
            "nama_tkbm5": "TOYO",
            "type_pengangkutan": 1,
            "kode_kendaraan": "DT70",
            "nama_kendaraan": "Dump Truck 70",
            "fcba": "MTE",
            "pabrik_tujuan": "DOM",
            "afdeling": "AFD-01",
            "tph": "1",
            "fieldcode": "A01A",
            "totaljanjang": "190",
            "output": "155",
            "janjangnormal": "160",
            "brondolan": "2",
            "mentah": "5",
            "abnormal": "3",
            "status_pengangkutan": "Planned",
            "card_id": "NFC 1234567890",
            "flag": "Y",
            "images": "http://172.16.5.199:82/file/pengangkutan_images/1735532659_Screenshot 2024-12-27 104602.png",
            "exception_case": "",
            "no_ba_exca": "",
            "afdeling_destination": "AFD-02",
            "fcba_destination": "MTE"
        }
    ]
}

Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/apps/pengangkutans

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

nopengangkutan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan No Pengangkutan. Example: DRC2010101101

nospb   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan No SPB. Example: SPB2024001259

nodokumen   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan No Dokumen. Example: SKJ-HOF/MTE/25/11/0001

tanggal   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan tanggal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-01

tanggal_end   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan rentang tanggal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-20

kode_karyawan_kerani   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan Kode Karyawan Kerani Transport. Example: 06-030922-240201-0531

kode_karyawan_driver   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan Kode Karyawan Kerani Driver. Example: 06-830717-190901-0112

tkbm1   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan kode karyawan tenaga kerja bongkar muat Pertama. Example: 06-830717-190901-0113

tkbm2   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan kode karyawan tenaga kerja bongkar muat Kedua. Example: 06-830717-190901-0114

tkbm3   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan kode karyawan tenaga kerja bongkar muat Ketiga. Example: 06-830717-190901-0115

tkbm4   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan kode karyawan tenaga kerja bongkar muat Keempat. Example: 06-830717-190901-0116

tkbm5   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan kode karyawan tenaga kerja bongkar muat Kelima. Example: 06-830717-190901-0117

type_pengangkutan   integer  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan type pengangkutan salah satu dari 1 (LANGSIR) atau 2 (DIRECT). Example: 1

kode_kendaraan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan Kode Kendaraan. Example: DT70

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan FCBA. Example: MTE

pabrik_tujuan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan tujuan tergantung type_pengangkutan jika Direct Maka akan diarahkan ke Business Unit dengan type M jika Langsir maka akan diarahkan ke TPH dengan tipe langsir kodenya (4). Example: DOM

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan afdeling. Example: AFD-01

tph   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan TPH. Example: 1

fieldcode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan FIELDCODE. Example: A02

status_pengangkutan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan Status Pengangkutan salah satu dari Planned, AuthorizedOnProgress, Approved. Example: Planned

flag   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan Status Upload Pengangkutan yang sudah diangkut akan berstatus Y jika belum maka N. Example: Y

fcba_destination   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan FCBA tujuan. Example: MTE

afdeling_destination   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan afdeling tujuan. Example: AFD-02

Menyimpan data Pengangkutan ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('nopengangkutan', 'et');
body.append('nospb', 'quis');
body.append('nodokumen', 'tempore');
body.append('tanggal', '2026-06-11');
body.append('kode_karyawan_kerani', 'sint');
body.append('kode_karyawan_driver', 'delectus');
body.append('tkbm1', 'repudiandae');
body.append('tkbm2', 'adipisci');
body.append('tkbm3', 'reiciendis');
body.append('tkbm4', 'velit');
body.append('tkbm5', 'sit');
body.append('type_pengangkutan', '19');
body.append('kode_kendaraan', 'totam');
body.append('fcba', 'sunt');
body.append('afdeling', 'qui');
body.append('fcba_destination', 'id');
body.append('afdeling_destination', 'quis');
body.append('pabrik_tujuan', 'voluptas');
body.append('totaljanjang', '18.2');
body.append('output', '45565.23632');
body.append('janjangnormal', '33485.1');
body.append('brondolan', '116944.201297');
body.append('mentah', '1.36137');
body.append('abnormal', '16255');
body.append('etd', '2026-06-11 10:47:25');
body.append('eta', '2026-06-11 10:47:25');
body.append('images', document.querySelector('input[name="images"]').files[0]);
body.append('no_ba_exca', document.querySelector('input[name="no_ba_exca"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',

            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],

Request      

POST api/apps/pengangkutans

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

nopengangkutan   string   

Example: et

nospb   string   

Example: quis

nodokumen   string   

Example: tempore

tanggal   string   

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d. Example: 2026-06-11

kode_karyawan_kerani   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: sint

kode_karyawan_driver   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: delectus

tkbm1   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: repudiandae

tkbm2   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: adipisci

tkbm3   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: reiciendis

tkbm4   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: velit

tkbm5   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: sit

type_pengangkutan   integer   

Example: 19

kode_kendaraan   string   

Example: totam

fcba   string  optional  

'tph' => 'nullable|required_if:type_pengangkutan,1|string|exists:tph,notph', 'fieldcode' => 'nullable|required_if:type_pengangkutan,1|string|exists:tph,fieldcode',. This field is required when type_pengangkutan is 1. The fcba of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: sunt

afdeling   string  optional  

This field is required when type_pengangkutan is 1. The division of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: qui

fcba_destination   string  optional  

The fcba of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: id

afdeling_destination   string  optional  

The division of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: quis

pabrik_tujuan   string   

Example: voluptas

totaljanjang   number   

Example: 18.2

output   number   

Example: 45565.23632

janjangnormal   number   

Example: 33485.1

brondolan   number  optional  

Example: 116944.201297

mentah   number  optional  

Example: 1.36137

abnormal   number  optional  

Example: 16255

etd   string  optional  

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d H:i:s. Example: 2026-06-11 10:47:25

eta   string  optional  

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d H:i:s. Example: 2026-06-11 10:47:25

images   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php176C.tmp

exception_case   string  optional  
no_ba_exca   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php176D.tmp

card_id   string  optional  
created_by   string  optional

);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",

};

    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans/6';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Mengubah data Pengangkutan berdasarkan id Pengangkutan.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans/15"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('kode_karyawan_kerani', 'ex');
body.append('kode_karyawan_driver', 'laudantium');
body.append('tkbm1', 'molestias');
body.append('tkbm2', 'quod');
body.append('tkbm3', 'dolor');
body.append('tkbm4', 'rerum');
body.append('tkbm5', 'debitis');
body.append('type_pengangkutan', '17');
body.append('kode_kendaraan', 'est');
body.append('tph', 'molestiae');
body.append('fieldcode', 'aliquam');
body.append('fcba', 'officia');
body.append('afdeling', 'est');
body.append('fcba_destination', 'totam');
body.append('afdeling_destination', 'error');
body.append('pabrik_tujuan', 'aspernatur');
body.append('totaljanjang', '17');
body.append('output', '6');
body.append('janjangnormal', '3');
body.append('brondolan', '11');
body.append('mentah', '3');
body.append('abnormal', '9');
body.append('eta', '2026-06-11 10:47:25');
body.append('etd', '2026-06-11 10:47:25');
body.append('images', document.querySelector('input[name="images"]').files[0]);
body.append('no_ba_exca', document.querySelector('input[name="no_ba_exca"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans/15';

PUT api/apps/pengangkutans/{id}

PATCH api/apps/pengangkutans/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Pengangkutan. Example: 15

Body Parameters

kode_karyawan_kerani   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: ex

kode_karyawan_driver   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: laudantium

tkbm1   string   

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: molestias

tkbm2   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: quod

tkbm3   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: dolor

tkbm4   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: rerum

tkbm5   string  optional  

The fccode of an existing record in the employee table. Example: debitis

type_pengangkutan   integer   

Example: 17

kode_kendaraan   string   

Example: est

tph   string   

The notph of an existing record in the tph table. Example: molestiae

fieldcode   string   

The fieldcode of an existing record in the tph table. Example: aliquam

fcba   string   

The fcba of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: officia

afdeling   string   

The division of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: est

fcba_destination   string  optional  

The fcba of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: totam

afdeling_destination   string  optional  

The division of an existing record in the sips_production.field table. Example: error

pabrik_tujuan   string   

Example: aspernatur

totaljanjang   integer   

Example: 17

output   integer   

Example: 6

janjangnormal   integer   

Example: 3

brondolan   integer  optional  

Example: 11

mentah   integer  optional  

Example: 3

abnormal   integer  optional  

Example: 9

eta   string  optional  

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d H:i:s. Example: 2026-06-11 10:47:25

etd   string  optional  

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d H:i:s. Example: 2026-06-11 10:47:25

images   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php17EB.tmp

exception_case   string  optional  
no_ba_exca   file  optional  

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\php17EC.tmp

Menghapus data Pengangkutan berdasarkan id Pengangkutan.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans/1';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

DELETE api/apps/pengangkutans/{id}

Headers

Authorization

Content-Type

ID Pengangkutan. Example: 1

Approved atau Reject status_pengangkutan (STATUS_PENGANGKUTAN) berdasarkan id Pengangkutan.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans/8/status"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "status_pengangkutan": "Planned"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans/8/status';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'status_pengangkutan' => 'Planned',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Headers

Authorization

Accept      

Example: application/json

Example: Planned

Must be one of:
  • Planned
  • Reject
  • Approved

Update SPBNO dan ETD berdasarkan id Pengangkutan.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans/16/spbno-etd"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "spbno": "illo",
    "etd": "2026-06-11 10:47:25"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/apps/pengangkutans/16/spbno-etd';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'spbno' => 'illo',
            'etd' => '2026-06-11 10:47:25',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

PATCH api/apps/pengangkutans/{id}/spbno-etd

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Pengangkutan. Example: 16

Example: illo

etd   string   

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d H:i:s. Example: 2026-06-11 10:47:25

Report

Memanggil data hasil panen.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memperlihatkan hasil panen pada report di Android SIPS Mobile Namun, jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, gunakan parameter pada URL berdasarkan Query Parameter. Data diurutkan berdasarkan No dokumen, tanggal, status, bisnis unit (fcba), afdeling, tph, blok

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/hasil-panen"
);

const params = {
    "nodokumen": "SKJ-PNN/MTE/07/25/001",
    "tanggaldari": "2024-12-19",
    "tanggalsampai": "2024-12-20",
    "tph": "1A02",
    "blok": "A02",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "status": "SELISIH",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/hasil-panen';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'nodokumen' => 'SKJ-PNN/MTE/07/25/001',
            'tanggaldari' => '2024-12-19',
            'tanggalsampai' => '2024-12-20',
            'tph' => '1A02',
            'blok' => 'A02',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'status' => 'SELISIH',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

    "message": "List Data Hasil Panen",
    "data": [

            "blok": "A02",
            "afdeling": "AFD-01",
            "fcba": "MTE",
            "janjang": "180",
            "status": "SELISIH",

    ]

Request      

GET api/report/hasil-panen

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

nodokumen   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Panen berdasarkan No Dokumen. Example: SKJ-PNN/MTE/07/25/001

tanggaldari   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Panen berdasarkan rentang tanggal, parameter ini diisi tanggal dari. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2024-12-19

tanggalsampai   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Panen berdasarkan rentang tanggal, parameter ini diisi tanggal sampai. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2024-12-20

tph   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Panen berdasarkan Kode TPH. Example: 1A02

blok   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Panen berdasarkan Blok. Example: A02

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Panen berdasarkan afdeling. Example: AFD-01

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Panen berdasarkan Bisnis Unit (FCBA). Example: MTE

status   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Panen berdasarkan Status Hasil Panen salah satu dari SELISIH,BELUM,SELESAI. Example: SELISIH

Memanggil data hasil pengangkutan.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data Pengangkutan secara keseluruhan yang dikelompokkan berdasarkan no pengangkutan. Namun, jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, gunakan parameter pada URL berdasarkan Query Parameter. Data diurutkan berdasarkan Tanggal terbaru, Afdeling, dan Kode Karyawan.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/hasil-pengangkutan"
);

const params = {
    "nopengangkutan": "DRC2010101101",
    "nospb": "SPB2024001259",
    "tanggal": "2025-11-01",
    "tanggal_end": "2025-11-20",
    "kode_karyawan_kerani": "06-030922-240201-0531",
    "kode_karyawan_driver": "06-830717-190901-0112",
    "tkbm1": "06-830717-190901-0113",
    "tkbm2": "06-830717-190901-0114",
    "tkbm3": "06-830717-190901-0115",
    "tkbm4": "06-830717-190901-0116",
    "tkbm5": "06-830717-190901-0117",
    "type_pengangkutan": "1",
    "kode_kendaraan": "DT70",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "pabrik_tujuan": "DOM",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/hasil-pengangkutan';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'nopengangkutan' => 'DRC2010101101',
            'nospb' => 'SPB2024001259',
            'tanggal' => '2025-11-01',
            'tanggal_end' => '2025-11-20',
            'kode_karyawan_kerani' => '06-030922-240201-0531',
            'kode_karyawan_driver' => '06-830717-190901-0112',
            'tkbm1' => '06-830717-190901-0113',
            'tkbm2' => '06-830717-190901-0114',
            'tkbm3' => '06-830717-190901-0115',
            'tkbm4' => '06-830717-190901-0116',
            'tkbm5' => '06-830717-190901-0117',
            'type_pengangkutan' => '1',
            'kode_kendaraan' => 'DT70',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'pabrik_tujuan' => 'DOM',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

    "message": "List Data Pengangkutan",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": "5",

Request      

GET api/report/hasil-pengangkutan

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

nopengangkutan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan No Pengangkutan. Example: DRC2010101101

nospb   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan No SPB. Example: SPB2024001259

tanggal   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan tanggal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-01

tanggal_end   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan rentang tanggal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-20

kode_karyawan_kerani   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan Kode Karyawan Kerani Transport. Example: 06-030922-240201-0531

kode_karyawan_driver   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan Kode Karyawan Kerani Driver. Example: 06-830717-190901-0112

tkbm1   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan kode karyawan tenaga kerja bongkar muat Pertama. Example: 06-830717-190901-0113

tkbm2   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan kode karyawan tenaga kerja bongkar muat Kedua. Example: 06-830717-190901-0114

tkbm3   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan kode karyawan tenaga kerja bongkar muat Ketiga. Example: 06-830717-190901-0115

tkbm4   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan kode karyawan tenaga kerja bongkar muat Keempat. Example: 06-830717-190901-0116

tkbm5   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan kode karyawan tenaga kerja bongkar muat Kelima. Example: 06-830717-190901-0117

type_pengangkutan   integer  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan type pengangkutan salah satu dari 1 (LANGSIR) atau 2 (DIRECT). Example: 1

kode_kendaraan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan Kode Kendaraan. Example: DT70

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan FCBA. Example: MTE

pabrik_tujuan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan tujuan tergantung type_pengangkutan jika Direct Maka akan diarahkan ke Business Unit dengan type M jika Langsir maka akan diarahkan ke TPH dengan tipe langsir kodenya (4). Example: DOM

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Pengangkutan berdasarkan afdeling. Example: AFD-01

Memanggil data hasil langsir.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memperlihatkan hasil langsir pada report di Android SIPS Mobile Namun, jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, gunakan parameter pada URL berdasarkan Query Parameter. Data diurutkan berdasarkan No dokumen, tanggal, status, bisnis unit (fcba), afdeling, tph, blok

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/hasil-langsir"
);

const params = {
    "tanggaldari": "2025-11-01",
    "tanggalsampai": "2025-12-20",
    "nopengangkutan": "LGS2010101101",
    "nodokumen": "SKJ-HOF/MTE/25/02/0001",
    "kode_kendaraan": "DT-R-5818-MSE",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "tujuan": "DOM",
    "status": "SELISIH",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/hasil-langsir';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'tanggaldari' => '2025-11-01',
            'tanggalsampai' => '2025-12-20',
            'nopengangkutan' => 'LGS2010101101',
            'nodokumen' => 'SKJ-HOF/MTE/25/02/0001',
            'kode_kendaraan' => 'DT-R-5818-MSE',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'tujuan' => 'DOM',
            'status' => 'SELISIH',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "List Data Hasil Langsir",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": "1",
            "tanggal": "2024-12-31 00:00:00",
            "nopengangkutan": "LGS2010101101",
            "nodokumen": "SKJ-HOF/MTE/25/02/0001",
            "kode_kendaraan": "DT-R-5818-MSE",
            "nama_kendaraan": "Dump Truck Rental KT 5818 MSE",
            "type_pengangkutan": "1",
            "fcba": "MTE",
            "afdeling": "AFD-01",
            "tujuan": "26",
            "janjang": "180",
            "janjang_diangkut": "190",
            "sisa": "-10",
            "status": "SELISIH",
            "informasi": "SELISIH : -10 JJG"
        }
    ]
}

Request      

GET api/report/hasil-langsir

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

tanggaldari   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Langsir berdasarkan rentang tanggal, parameter ini diisi tanggal dari. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-01

tanggalsampai   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Langsir berdasarkan rentang tanggal, parameter ini diisi tanggal sampai. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-12-20

nopengangkutan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Langsir berdasarkan No Pengangkutan. Example: LGS2010101101

nodokumen   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Langsir berdasarkan No Dokumen. Example: SKJ-HOF/MTE/25/02/0001

kode_kendaraan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Langsir berdasarkan kode_kendaraan. Example: DT-R-5818-MSE

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Langsir berdasarkan Bisnis Unit (FCBA). Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Langsir berdasarkan afdeling. Example: AFD-01

tujuan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Langsir berdasarkan tujuan. Example: DOM

status   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Hasil Langsir berdasarkan Status Hasil Langsir salah satu dari SELISIH,BELUM,SELESAI. Example: SELISIH

Memanggil data Attendance GAD / Attendance GAD Temp dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil SIPS Mobile untuk dimasukkan ke Attendance GAD / Attendance GAD Temp. Namun, jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, gunakan parameter pada URL berdasarkan Query Parameter. Data diurutkan berdasarkan Tanggal terbaru, FCBA, Afdeling, Gang, dan Kode Karyawan.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/upload-attendance"
);

const params = {
    "totalcount": "2",
    "tanggal": "2025-11-01",
    "tanggal_end": "2025-11-20",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "gangcode": "PN013",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/upload-attendance';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'totalcount' => '2',
            'tanggal' => '2025-11-01',
            'tanggal_end' => '2025-11-20',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'gangcode' => 'PN013',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

GET api/report/upload-attendance

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

totalcount   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Attendance berdasarkan nilai lebih dari totalcount. Example: 2

tanggal   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Attendance berdasarkan tanggal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-01

tanggal_end   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Attendance berdasarkan rentang tanggal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-20

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Attendance berdasarkan FCBA. Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Attendance berdasarkan afdeling. Example: AFD-01

gangcode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter Attendance berdasarkan gangcode. Example: PN013

Memanggil data Harvesting SPB dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data harvesting SPB dari SIPS Mobile. Data menampilkan informasi bunch, bucket, dan weight calculations berdasarkan weighbridge ticket untuk tipe pengangkutan DIRECT TRANSPORT. Namun, jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, gunakan parameter pada URL berdasarkan Query Parameter. Data diurutkan berdasarkan Tanggal penerimaan terbaru, No SPB, dan Chit Number.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/upload-harvesting"
);

const params = {
    "nospb": "SPB2026004804",
    "tanggal": "2026-02-08",
    "tanggal_end": "2026-02-09",
    "kode_kendaraan": "L9770CL",
    "kode_karyawan_driver": "HENDRA",
    "mill": "DOM",
    "fcba": "PTE",
    "chitno": "TBS2026004804",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/upload-harvesting';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'nospb' => 'SPB2026004804',
            'tanggal' => '2026-02-08',
            'tanggal_end' => '2026-02-09',
            'kode_kendaraan' => 'L9770CL',
            'kode_karyawan_driver' => 'HENDRA',
            'mill' => 'DOM',
            'fcba' => 'PTE',
            'chitno' => 'TBS2026004804',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):

    "success": true,
    "message": "List Data Detail Pengangkutan dengan Weighbridge",
    "data": [
        {

Request      

GET api/report/upload-harvesting

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

nospb   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan No SPB. Example: SPB2026004804

tanggal   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan tanggal penerimaan. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2026-02-08

tanggal_end   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan rentang tanggal penerimaan. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2026-02-09

kode_kendaraan   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kode Kendaraan. Example: L9770CL

kode_karyawan_driver   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Nama Driver. Example: HENDRA

mill   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Pabrik Tujuan. Example: DOM

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan FCBA. Example: PTE

chitno   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Weighbridge Chit Number. Example: TBS2026004804

Memanggil data Harvesting Quality dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data Harvesting Quality yang belum tersinkronisasi ke sistem SIPS Production Gunakan parameter pada URL untuk filtering data berdasarkan Query Parameter. Data diurutkan berdasarkan tanggal panen dan kode blok.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/upload-harvesting-quality"
);

const params = {
    "empcode": "06-000223-230221-0323",
    "fddate": "2025-11-05",
    "fddate_end": "2025-11-15",
    "fieldcode": "I43",
    "fcba": "MTE",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/upload-harvesting-quality';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'empcode' => '06-000223-230221-0323',
            'fddate' => '2025-11-05',
            'fddate_end' => '2025-11-15',
            'fieldcode' => 'I43',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):

    "message": "List Data Harvesting Quality",

            "overripe": "1",

Query Parameters

empcode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kode Karyawan. Example: 06-000223-230221-0323

fddate   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan tanggal panen, parameter ini untuk tanggal awal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-05

fddate_end   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan rentang tanggal, parameter ini untuk tanggal akhir. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-15

fieldcode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kode Blok. Example: I43

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Bisnis Unit (FCBA). Example: MTE

Memanggil data LHM dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data LHM untuk upload ke sistem SIPS Production Gunakan parameter pada URL untuk filtering data berdasarkan Query Parameter.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/upload-lhm"
);

const params = {
    "fddate": "2025-11-05",
    "fddate_end": "2025-11-15",
    "kemandoran": "MD011",
    "employeecode": "06-000223-230221-0323",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "tahuntanam": "2010",
    "blok": "I43",
    "attendance": "KJ",
    "level_user": "MDP",
    "upload": "N",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/upload-lhm';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'fddate' => '2025-11-05',
            'fddate_end' => '2025-11-15',

            'employeecode' => '06-000223-230221-0323',

            'blok' => 'I43',
            'attendance' => 'KJ',
            'level_user' => 'MDP',
            'upload' => 'N',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

GET api/report/upload-lhm

Headers

Authorization

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

fddate   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan tanggal panen, parameter ini untuk tanggal awal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-05

fddate_end   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan rentang tanggal, parameter ini untuk tanggal akhir. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-15

kemandoran   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kemandoran. Example: MD011

employeecode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kode Karyawan. Example: 06-000223-230221-0323

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Bisnis Unit (FCBA). Example: MTE

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Afdeling. Example: AFD-01

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Tahun tanam. Example: 2010
