Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kode Blok. Example: I43

attendance   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kode Attendance. Example: KJ

level_user   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kode Level_User. Example: MDP

upload   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kode Upload Y atau N. Example: N

Memanggil data LHM dari SIPS Mobile yang akan diupload.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data LHM untuk Approval agar terupload ke sistem SIPS Production Gunakan parameter pada URL untuk filtering data berdasarkan Query Parameter.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/get-lhm"
);

const params = {
    "fddate": "2025-11-05",
    "fddate_end": "2025-11-15",
    "kemandoran": "MD011",
    "employeecode": "06-000223-230221-0323",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "tahuntanam": "2010",
    "blok": "I43",
    "attendance": "KJ",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/get-lhm';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'fddate' => '2025-11-05',
            'fddate_end' => '2025-11-15',
            'kemandoran' => 'MD011',
            'employeecode' => '06-000223-230221-0323',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'tahuntanam' => '2010',
            'blok' => 'I43',
            'attendance' => 'KJ',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

GET api/report/get-lhm

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

fddate   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan tanggal panen, parameter ini untuk tanggal awal. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-05

fddate_end   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan rentang tanggal, parameter ini untuk tanggal akhir. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2025-11-15

kemandoran   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kemandoran. Example: MD011

employeecode   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kode Karyawan. Example: 06-000223-230221-0323

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Bisnis Unit (FCBA). Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Afdeling. Example: AFD-01

tahuntanam   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Tahun tanam. Example: 2010

blok   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kode Blok. Example: I43

attendance   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kode Attendance. Example: KJ

Memanggil data LHA dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data LHA dari SIPS Mobile. Data menampilkan informasi panen. Namun, jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, gunakan parameter pada URL berdasarkan Query Parameter. Data diurutkan berdasarkan Tanggal panen.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/get-lha"
);

const params = {
    "tanggal": "2026-02-08",
    "tanggal_end": "2026-02-09",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "kemandoran": "MD011",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/get-lha';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'tanggal' => '2026-02-08',
            'tanggal_end' => '2026-02-09',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'kemandoran' => 'MD011',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):

 "success": true,
 "message": "List Data LHA",
 "data": [
     {

         "fcba": "MTE",

         "fcname": "G47",

         "mentah": "0",
         "overripe": "6",
         "busuk": "0",
         "busuk2": "0",
         "buahkecil": "0",
         "parteno": "29",
         "tangkaipanjang": "0",

     },
 ]
}

GET api/report/get-lha

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

tanggal   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan tanggal penerimaan. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2026-02-08

tanggal_end   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan rentang tanggal penerimaan. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2026-02-09

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan FCBA. Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Afdeling. Example: AFD-01

kemandoran   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kemandoran. Example: MD011

Memanggil data Harvesting dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data harvesting dari SIPS Mobile. Data menampilkan informasi panen. Namun, jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, gunakan parameter pada URL berdasarkan Query Parameter. Data diurutkan berdasarkan Tanggal panen.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/get-harvesting"
);

const params = {
    "tanggal": "2026-02-08",
    "tanggal_end": "2026-02-09",
    "fcba": "MTE",
    "afdeling": "AFD-01",
    "kemandoran": "MD011",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/report/get-harvesting';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'tanggal' => '2026-02-08',
            'tanggal_end' => '2026-02-09',
            'fcba' => 'MTE',
            'afdeling' => 'AFD-01',
            'kemandoran' => 'MD011',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

GET api/report/get-harvesting

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

tanggal   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan tanggal penerimaan. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2026-02-08

tanggal_end   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan rentang tanggal penerimaan. Harus dalam format YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2026-02-09

fcba   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan FCBA. Example: MTE

afdeling   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Afdeling. Example: AFD-01

kemandoran   string  optional  

Optional. Filter berdasarkan Kemandoran. Example: MD011

Uploads

Upload Attendance ke database SIPS.

requires authentication

Endpoint ini digunakan untuk mengirim data attendance dari SIPS Mobile ke tabel IPLASPROD.ATTENDANCE_GAD dan IPLASPROD.ATTENDANCE_GAD_TEMP. Data harus dikirim sebagai array dengan struktur sesuai format GET /report/upload-attendance.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/attendance"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "data": [
        "velit"
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/attendance';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'data' => [
                'velit',
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Data Karyawan berhasil ditambahkan.",
    "data": [
        368,
        368,
        368,
        368
    ]
}

Example response (400, invalid data):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Data tidak valid atau kosong."
}

Example response (500, error):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Terjadi kesalahan saat menyimpan data. Silakan coba lagi.",
    "error": "Deskripsi error dari database"
}

Request      

POST api/uploads/attendance

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

data   string[]   

Array data attendance yang akan diinsert ke tabel ATTENDANCE_GAD dan ATTENDANCE_GAD_TEMP.
gangcode   string   

Kode gang. Example: PN011

fddate   string   

Tanggal attendance (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS). Example: 2025-11-08 00:00:00

supervision_1   string  optional  

optional Kode mandor panen 1.

supervision_2   string  optional  

optional Kode mandor panen 2.

supervision_3   string  optional  

optional Kode kerani.

supervision_4   string  optional  

optional Supervisi 4.

supervision_5   string  optional  

optional Supervisi 5.

employeecode   string   

Kode karyawan. Example: 06-770323-130910-0047

attendance   string   

Status attendance. Example: KJ

jobcode   string  optional  

optional Kode pekerjaan. Example: 505030101

locationtype   string  optional  

optional Tipe lokasi. Example: FF

locationcode   string  optional  

optional Kode lokasi. Example: I45P

mandays   number  optional  

optional Mandays. Example: 0.16666666666667

othrs   number  optional  

optional Jam lembur. Example: 0

rate   number  optional  

optional Tarif. Example: 0

unit   number  optional  

optional Unit kerja. Example: 25

output   number  optional  

optional Output. Example: 0.425

reference   string  optional  

optional Referensi.

remarks   string  optional  

optional Keterangan. Example: SIPS MOBILE

fcentry   string  optional  

optional Dibuat oleh. Example: andrew

fcedit   string  optional  

optional Diubah oleh.

fcip   string  optional  

optional IP address.

fcba   string   

Kode FCBA. Example: MTE

lastupdate   string  optional  

optional Waktu update terakhir. Example: 2026-01-09 14:20:27

lasttime   string  optional  

optional Jam update terakhir. Example: 14:20

linenokey   integer   

Key unik baris. Example: 1442813

overtime_hours   number  optional  

optional Jam lembur. Example: 0

type_overtime   integer  optional  

optional Tipe lembur. Example: 0

chargejob   string  optional  

optional Job yang dibebankan.

chargetype   string  optional  

optional Tipe yang dibebankan.

chargecode   string  optional  

optional Kode yang dibebankan.

bucket   string  optional  

optional Bucket.

spbno   string  optional  

optional No SPB.

kg_janjang   number  optional  

optional Berat janjang (kg). Example: 384.75

kg_brondolan   number  optional  

optional Berat brondolan (kg). Example: 1.75

rowstate   string  optional  

optional Status baris. Example: Approved

document_classification   integer  optional  

optional Klasifikasi dokumen. Example: 501

basis_bm   integer  optional  

optional Basis BM. Example: 0

bjr   number  optional  

optional BJR. Example: 15.39

documentno   integer   

Nomor dokumen. Example: 368

sourcetime   string  optional  

optional Waktu sumber data. Example: 2025-11-09 00:24:37

janjang   number  optional  

optional Janjang (untuk ATTENDANCE_GAD_TEMP). Example: 0

generate   string  optional  

optional Informasi generate (untuk ATTENDANCE_GAD_TEMP). Example: SIPS MOBILE GENERATE

generatetime   string  optional  

optional Waktu generate (untuk ATTENDANCE_GAD_TEMP). Example: 2026-01-09 14:20:27

fieldcode   string  optional  

optional Kode field. Example: I45

Upload Harvesting SPB ke database SIPS.

requires authentication

Endpoint ini digunakan untuk mengirim data harvesting SPB dari SIPS Mobile ke tabel IPLASPROD.HARVESTINGSPB. Data harus dikirim sebagai array dengan struktur sesuai format GET /report/upload-harvesting.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/harvesting"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "data": [
        "saepe"
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/harvesting';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'data' => [
                'saepe',
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Data Harvesting SPB berhasil ditambahkan.",
    "data": [
        "SPB2026004804",
        "SPB2026004769",
        "SPB2026004781"
    ]
}

Example response (400, invalid data):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Data tidak valid atau kosong."
}

Example response (500, error):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Terjadi kesalahan saat menyimpan data. Silakan coba lagi.",
    "error": "Deskripsi error dari database"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/uploads/harvesting

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

data   string[]   

Array data harvesting SPB yang akan diinsert ke tabel HARVESTINGSPB.
spbno   string   

No SPB. Example: SPB2026004804

fieldcode   string   

Kode field. Example: M06

receptiondate   string   

Tanggal penerimaan (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS). Example: 2026-02-08 00:00:00

harvestdate   string   

Tanggal panen (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS). Example: 2026-02-08 00:00:00

cropcode   string   

Kode tanaman. Example: OP

productcode   string   

Kode produk. Example: TBS

own   string   

Tipe kepemilikan. Example: OWN

vehicle   string   

Kode kendaraan. Example: L9770CL

driver   string   

Nama driver. Example: HENDRA

mill   string   

Pabrik tujuan. Example: DOM

agreementcode   string  optional  

optional Kode agreement. Example: Example: laudantium

transporttype   string   

Tipe transportasi. Example: DIRECTTRANSPORT

spb_type   integer   

Tipe SPB. Example: 0

bunch   number   

Jumlah bunch. Example: 127

bucket   number  optional  

optional Jumlah bucket. Example: Example: 56

pressemester_abw   number   

Press semester ABW. Example: 11.19

bunch_estateweight   number   

Berat bunch estate. Example: 1421

fcentry   string   

Dibuat oleh. Example: PTE_PRODUKSI

fcedit   string   

Diubah oleh. Example: PTE_PRODUKSI

fcip   string   

IP address. Example: 114.10.139.104

fcba   string   

Kode FCBA. Example: PTE

chitno   string   

Weighbridge Chit Number. Example: TBS2026004804

mill_weight_bruto   number   

Berat bruto pabrik (kg). Example: 10090

mill_weight_gross   number   

Berat gross pabrik (kg). Example: 5920

mill_weight_tarra   number   

Berat tarra pabrik (kg). Example: 4170

mill_weight_potongan   number   

Berat potongan pabrik (kg). Example: 295.92

mill_weight_netto   number   

Berat netto pabrik (kg). Example: 5624.08

mentah   string  optional  

optional Mentah. Example: Example: quasi

tankos   string  optional  

optional Tankos. Example: Example: qui

hilang   string  optional  

optional Hilang. Example: Example: quod

keterangan   string  optional  

optional Keterangan. Example: Example: ut

mill_weight_dtl   number   

Detail berat pabrik (kg). Example: 1173.27

bjr_chit   number   

BJR per Chit. Example: 9.24

Upload Harvesting Quality ke database SIPS.

requires authentication

Endpoint ini digunakan untuk mengirim data harvesting quality dari SIPS Mobile ke tabel IPLASPROD.HARVESTINGQUALITY. Data harus dikirim sebagai array dengan struktur sesuai format GET /report/upload-harvesting-quality.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/harvestingquality"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "data": [
        "tempora"
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/harvestingquality';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'data' => [
                'tempora',
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Data Harvesting Quality berhasil ditambahkan.",
    "data": [
        "42",
        "43",
        "44"
    ]
}

Example response (400, invalid data):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Data tidak valid atau kosong."
}

Example response (500, error):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Terjadi kesalahan saat menyimpan data. Silakan coba lagi.",
    "error": "Deskripsi error dari database"
}
Received response:

You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/uploads/harvestingquality

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

data   string[]   

Array data harvesting quality yang akan diinsert ke tabel HARVESTINGQUALITY.
empcode   string   

Kode karyawan panen. Example: 06-000223-230221-0323

fddate   string   

Tanggal panen (format: YYYY-MM-DD). Example: 2025-11-05

fieldcode   string   

Kode blok/field. Example: I43

under_ripe   integer   

Buah mentah. Example: 1

over_ripe   integer   

Buah overripe. Example: 1

abnormal   integer   

Buah abnormal. Example: 1

long_stalk   integer   

Tangkai panjang. Example: 1

eaten_by_rat   integer   

Dimakan tikus. Example: 0

unharvest_ffb   integer   

FFB tidak dipanen. Example: 1

uncollect_lf_circle   integer   

Pelepah lingkaran tidak dikumpulkan. Example: 0

uncollect_lf_piece   integer   

Pelepah potong tidak dikumpulkan. Example: 0

unarrange_ffb   integer   

FFB tidak tersusun. Example: 0

unprune_frond   integer   

Pelepah tidak dipangkas. Example: 0

qe_1   integer   

QE 1 - Pelepah tidak disusun. Example: 0

qe_2   integer   

QE 2 - Buah matahari. Example: 0

qe_3   integer   

QE 3 - Buah busuk. Example: 1

qe_4   integer   

QE 4 - Buah mentah diperam. Example: 0

qe_5   integer   

QE 5 - Over pruning. Example: 0

qe_6   integer   

QE 6 - Brondolan tidak dialas. Example: 0

qe_7   integer   

QE 7 - Brondolan kotor sampah. Example: 0

qe_8   integer   

QE 8 - Buah dibelah. Example: 0

qe_9   integer   

QE 9. Example: 0

qe_10   integer   

QE 10. Example: 0

fcentry   string  optional  

optional Dibuat oleh. Example: Example: eum

fcedit   string  optional  

optional Diubah oleh. Example: Example: reiciendis

fcip   string  optional  

optional IP address. Example: Example: rem

fcba   string   

Kode FCBA. Example: MTE

qe_11   integer   

QE 11 - Buah mentah A1. Example: 0

qe_12   integer   

QE 12 - Buah tinggal S. Example: 0

qe_13   integer   

QE 13 - Benggol panjang tidak dipotong. Example: 0

qe_14   integer   

QE 14. Example: 0

qe_15   integer   

QE 15. Example: 0

qe_16   integer   

QE 16 - Buah mentah kerani. Example: 0

qe_17   integer   

QE 17 - Buah mentah mandor. Example: 0

documentno   integer   

Nomor dokumen. Example: 42

Upload ke SIPS Mobile dari Attendance .

requires authentication

Endpoint ini digunakan untuk mengirim data attendance dari SIPS Mobile ke tabel SIPSMOBILE.ATTENDANCE_GAD. Data harus dikirim sebagai array dengan struktur sesuai format GET /report/upload-attendance.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/attendance/mobile"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "data": [
        "dolorem"
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/attendance/mobile';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'data' => [
                'dolorem',
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Data Karyawan berhasil ditambahkan.",
    "data": [
        368,
        368,
        368,
        368
    ]
}

Example response (400, invalid data):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Data tidak valid atau kosong."
}

Example response (500, error):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Terjadi kesalahan saat menyimpan data. Silakan coba lagi.",
    "error": "Deskripsi error dari database"
}

Upload ke SIPS Mobile dari Harvesting SPB .

requires authentication

Endpoint ini digunakan untuk mengirim data harvesting SPB dari SIPS Mobile ke tabel SIPSMOBILE.HARVESTINGSPB. Data harus dikirim sebagai array dengan struktur sesuai format GET /report/upload-harvesting.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/harvesting/mobile"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "data": [
        "asperiores"
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/harvesting/mobile';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'data' => [
                'asperiores',
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

    "success": true,

Upload ke SIPS Mobile dari Harvesting Quality.

requires authentication

Endpoint ini digunakan untuk mengirim data harvesting quality dari SIPS Mobile ke tabel SIPSMOBILE.HARVESTINGQUALITY. Data harus dikirim sebagai array dengan struktur sesuai format GET /report/upload-harvesting-quality.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/harvestingquality/mobile"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "data": [
        "quibusdam"
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/harvestingquality/mobile';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'data' => [
                'quibusdam',
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Data Harvesting Quality berhasil ditambahkan.",
    "data": [
        "42",
        "43",
        "44"
    ]
}

Example response (400, invalid data):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Data tidak valid atau kosong."
}

Example response (500, error):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Terjadi kesalahan saat menyimpan data. Silakan coba lagi.",
    "error": "Deskripsi error dari database"
}

Request      

POST api/uploads/harvestingquality/mobile

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

data   string[]   

Array data harvesting quality yang akan diinsert ke tabel HARVESTINGQUALITY.
empcode   string   

Kode karyawan panen. Example: 06-000223-230221-0323

fddate   string   

Tanggal panen (format: YYYY-MM-DD). Example: 2025-11-05

fieldcode   string   

Kode blok/field. Example: I43

under_ripe   integer   

Buah mentah. Example: 1

over_ripe   integer   

Buah overripe. Example: 1

abnormal   integer   

Buah abnormal. Example: 1

long_stalk   integer   

Tangkai panjang. Example: 1

eaten_by_rat   integer   

Dimakan tikus. Example: 0

unharvest_ffb   integer   

FFB tidak dipanen. Example: 1

uncollect_lf_circle   integer   

Pelepah lingkaran tidak dikumpulkan. Example: 0

uncollect_lf_piece   integer   

Pelepah potong tidak dikumpulkan. Example: 0

unarrange_ffb   integer   

FFB tidak tersusun. Example: 0

unprune_frond   integer   

Pelepah tidak dipangkas. Example: 0

qe_1   integer   

QE 1 - Pelepah tidak disusun. Example: 0

qe_2   integer   

QE 2 - Buah matahari. Example: 0

qe_3   integer   

QE 3 - Buah busuk. Example: 1

qe_4   integer   

QE 4 - Buah mentah diperam. Example: 0

qe_5   integer   

QE 5 - Over pruning. Example: 0

qe_6   integer   

QE 6 - Brondolan tidak dialas. Example: 0

qe_7   integer   

QE 7 - Brondolan kotor sampah. Example: 0

qe_8   integer   

QE 8 - Buah dibelah. Example: 0

qe_9   integer   

QE 9. Example: 0

qe_10   integer   

QE 10. Example: 0

fcentry   string  optional  

optional Dibuat oleh. Example: Example: aut

fcedit   string  optional  

optional Diubah oleh. Example: Example: ea

fcip   string  optional  

optional IP address. Example: Example: modi

fcba   string   

Kode FCBA. Example: MTE

qe_11   integer   

QE 11 - Buah mentah A1. Example: 0

qe_12   integer   

QE 12 - Buah tinggal S. Example: 0

qe_13   integer   

QE 13 - Benggol panjang tidak dipotong. Example: 0

qe_14   integer   

QE 14. Example: 0

qe_15   integer   

QE 15. Example: 0

qe_16   integer   

QE 16 - Buah mentah kerani. Example: 0

qe_17   integer   

QE 17 - Buah mentah mandor. Example: 0

documentno   integer   

Nomor dokumen. Example: 42

Approval LHM SIPSMobile.

requires authentication

Endpoint ini digunakan untuk melakukan kegiatan approval. Data harus dikirim sebagai array dengan struktur untuk perhitungan upah harian karyawan.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/lhm_data/mobile"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "data": [
        "nobis"
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/lhm_data/mobile';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'data' => [
                'nobis',
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Data LHM berhasil ditambahkan.",
    "data": [
        1,
        2,
        3
    ]
}

Example response (400, invalid data):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Data tidak valid atau kosong."
}

Example response (500, error):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Terjadi kesalahan saat menyimpan data. Silakan coba lagi.",
    "error": "Deskripsi error dari database"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/uploads/lhm_data/mobile

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

data   string[]   

Array data LHM yang akan diinsert ke tabel LHM_DATA.
ID   string   

ID Data Absensi (format: YYYY-MM-DD). Example: 123311

ROWDATA   string   

baris data. Example: 1

HA   string   

baris data. Example: 2.7

Open LHM SIPSMobile.

requires authentication

Endpoint ini digunakan untuk mengirim data LHM (Laporan Harian Mandor) dari SIPS Mobile ke tabel SIPSMOBILE.LHM_DATA. Data harus dikirim sebagai array dengan struktur untuk perhitungan upah harian karyawan.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/open_lhm_data/mobile"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "data": [
        "quia"
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/uploads/open_lhm_data/mobile';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'data' => [
                'quia',
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Data LHM berhasil dibuka.",
    "data": [
        1,
        2,
        3
    ]
}

Example response (400, invalid data):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Data tidak valid atau kosong."
}

Example response (500, error):


{
    "success": false,
    "message": "Terjadi kesalahan saat menyimpan data. Silakan coba lagi.",
    "error": "Deskripsi error dari database"
}

App Update

Check update aplikasi

Digunakan oleh mobile app untuk mengecek versi terbaru.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/app-update/check"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "app_name": "similique",
    "platform": "android",
    "version": "1.0.0"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/app-update/check';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'app_name' => 'similique',
            'platform' => 'android',
            'version' => '1.0.0',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200):


{
    "app_name": "sipsmobile",
    "update": true,
    "latest_version": "1.1.0",
    "force_update": false,
    "download_url": "https://domain.com/file/apps/android/app-1.1.0.apk",
    "file_size": 120000000,
    "changelog": "Bug fix & improvement"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/app-update/check

Headers

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

app_name   string   

Example: similique

platform   string   

Platform aplikasi. Example: android

version   string  optional  

optional Versi aplikasi yang diinginkan user. Example: 1.0.0

Upload aplikasi

Endpoint ini digunakan untuk upload file aplikasi mobile yang akan digunakan oleh sistem update aplikasi.

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/app/apk"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('app_name', 'aspernatur');
body.append('platform', 'android');
body.append('version', '1.0.0');
body.append('force_update', '');
body.append('min_version', '1.0.0');
body.append('changelog', 'Bug fix');
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/app/apk';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'app_name',
                'contents' => 'aspernatur'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'platform',
                'contents' => 'android'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'version',
                'contents' => '1.0.0'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'force_update',
                'contents' => ''
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'min_version',
                'contents' => '1.0.0'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'changelog',
                'contents' => 'Bug fix'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'file',
                'contents' => fopen('C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\phpEE2.tmp', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "platform": "android",
        "version": "1.0.0",
        "file_name": "app-1.0.0-1710000000.apk",
        "file_path": "file/apps/android/app-1.0.0-1710000000.apk",
        "file_size": 120000000,
        "file_extension": "apk",
        "force_update": false,
        "changelog": "Bug fix",
        "created_at": "2026-03-09"
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/app/apk

Headers

Content-Type      

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

app_name   string   

Example: aspernatur

platform   string   

Platform aplikasi. Example: android

version   string   

Versi aplikasi. Example: 1.0.0

file   file   

File aplikasi yang akan diupload. Example: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\2\phpEE2.tmp

force_update   boolean  optional  

Optional. Apakah update wajib. Example: false

min_version   string  optional  

Optional. Versi minimum aplikasi. Example: 1.0.0

changelog   string  optional  

Optional. Catatan perubahan aplikasi. Example: Bug fix

List semua versi aplikasi

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/app/apks"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/app/apks';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "success": true,
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 3,
            "version": "2.6.1",
            "file_name": "GeoLens_v2.6.1_release_arm64-v8a.apk",
            "file_path": "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/FILES/GeoLens_v2.6.1_release_arm64-v8a.apk",
            "file_size": 142130813,
            "file_extension": "apk",
            "uploaded_by": "SKJ_HOJ",
            "created_at": "2026-05-25T07:07:33.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2026-05-25T07:07:33.000000Z",
            "platform": "Android",
            "min_version": "2.6.0",
            "force_update": false,
            "changelog": "• Akses Login Universal: Sekarang seluruh pengguna dengan status aktif dapat masuk ke aplikasi tanpa batasan level tertentu.\n• Perbaikan Dark Mode: Perbaikan beberapa tampilan yang belum Dark Mode.",
            "app_name": "geolens"
        },
        {
            "id": 2,
            "version": "2.6.0",
            "file_name": "GeoLens_v2.6.0_release_arm64-v8a.apk",
            "file_path": "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/FILES/GeoLens_v2.6.0_release_arm64-v8a.apk",
            "file_size": 142130813,
            "file_extension": "apk",
            "uploaded_by": "SKJ_HOJ",
            "created_at": "2026-05-25T04:57:36.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2026-05-25T04:57:36.000000Z",
            "platform": "Android",
            "min_version": "2.6.0",
            "force_update": false,
            "changelog": "• Penambahan halaman Login\n• Tombol Kembali yang Lebih Mudah\n• Tampilan Layar Lebih Bersih Modern\n• Deteksi Objek Lebih Cepat\n• Ikon Dinamis pada Peta\n• Perbaikan Menu Peta\n• Ukuran Aplikasi Lebih Ringan\n• Sinkronisasi Data di Background\n• Notifikasi Progress Sinkronisasi\n• Kompas Detail yang Lebih Nyaman\n• Memperbaiki masalah gambar pecah pada peta saat HP diputar ke posisi landscape\n• Pembaruan Logo Aplikasi\n• Menu Informasi Aplikasi\n• Fitur Cek Pembaruan\n• Peningkatan Fitur Foto Deteksi\n• Menambahkan Label Blok pada Menu GIS\n• Redesain Dashboard Home\n• Daftar Prioritas Blok\n• Menu Detail Panen Terpisah\n• Fitur Urut Data (Sorting) Status\n• Navigasi Swipe Antar Menu\n• Dukungan Mode Gelap (Dark Mode)\n• Peningkatan Visual Navigasi\n• Pewarnaan Blok Berdasarkan Wilayah",
            "app_name": "geolens"
        },
        {
            "id": 1,
            "version": "1.0.675-675",
            "file_name": "SipsMobile-debug-1.0.675-675.apk",
            "file_path": "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/FILES/SipsMobile-debug-1.0.675-675.apk",
            "file_size": 61728476,
            "file_extension": "apk",
            "uploaded_by": "SKJ_HOJ",
            "created_at": "2026-05-24T11:29:14.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2026-05-24T11:29:14.000000Z",
            "platform": "Android",
            "min_version": "1.0.0",
            "force_update": false,
            "changelog": "- Improvement pada pembuatan nomor spb, menggunakan format baru\n- Check scanner absensi, cegah absen diri sendiri",
            "app_name": "sipsmobile"
        }
    ]
}

Hapus versi aplikasi

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/app/apk/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/app/apk/1';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

DELETE api/app/apk/{id}

Headers

Accept      

Example: application/json

Settings

Devices

Sub Group untuk Device Management

Memanggil data device dari SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

API ini digunakan untuk memanggil data device secara keseluruhan. Tetapi jika ingin melakukan filter pada data yang dipanggil, buatlah parameter pada Url berdasarkan Query Parameter

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/settings/devices"
);

const params = {
    "q": "DEV-00001",
    "per_page": "10",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/settings/devices';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'query' => [
            'q' => 'DEV-00001',
            'per_page' => '10',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (200, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "List Data Device",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "device_id": "DEV-00001",
            "mac_address": "00:11:22:33:44:55",
            "imei": "123456789012345",
            "device_name": "Operator Phone",
            "platform": "android",
            "os_version": "13",
            "app_version": "1.0.0",
            "assigned_to": "John Doe",
            "status": "active",
            "registered_at": "2025-12-12T10:00:00.000000Z",
            "registered_by": 1,
            "last_login_at": "2025-12-12T10:05:00.000000Z",
            "last_latitude": -6.2,
            "last_longitude": 106.816666,
            "notes": "Device assigned to new operator",
            "created_at": "2025-12-12T10:00:00.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2025-12-12T10:00:00.000000Z"
        }
    ],
    "meta": {
        "current_page": 1,
        "from": 1,
        "last_page": 1,
        "per_page": 15,
        "to": 1,
        "total": 1
    }
}

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/settings/devices

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

q   string  optional  

Optional. Search device berdasarkan device_id, device_name, mac_address, atau imei. Example: DEV-00001

per_page   integer  optional  

Optional. Jumlah data per halaman. Default: 15. Example: 10

Menyimpan data device ke dalam database SIPS Mobile.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/settings/devices"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "device_id": "DEV-00001",
    "mac_address": "00:11:22:33:44:55",
    "imei": "123456789012345",
    "device_name": "Operator Phone",
    "platform": "android",
    "os_version": "13",
    "app_version": "1.0.0",
    "assigned_to": "John Doe",
    "status": "active",
    "registered_at": "2025-12-12 10:00:00",
    "registered_by": 1,
    "last_login_at": "2025-12-12 10:05:00",
    "last_latitude": -6.2,
    "last_longitude": 106.816666,
    "notes": "Device assigned to new operator"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/settings/devices';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'device_id' => 'DEV-00001',
            'mac_address' => '00:11:22:33:44:55',
            'imei' => '123456789012345',
            'device_name' => 'Operator Phone',
            'platform' => 'android',
            'os_version' => '13',
            'app_version' => '1.0.0',
            'assigned_to' => 'John Doe',
            'status' => 'active',
            'registered_at' => '2025-12-12 10:00:00',
            'registered_by' => 1,
            'last_login_at' => '2025-12-12 10:05:00',
            'last_latitude' => -6.2,
            'last_longitude' => 106.816666,
            'notes' => 'Device assigned to new operator',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Example response (201, success):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Data Device berhasil ditambahkan.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "device_id": "DEV-00001",
        "mac_address": "00:11:22:33:44:55",
        "imei": "123456789012345",
        "device_name": "Operator Phone",
        "platform": "android",
        "os_version": "13",
        "app_version": "1.0.0",

        "status": "active",
        "registered_at": "2025-12-12T10:00:00.000000Z",

        "last_login_at": "2025-12-12T10:05:00.000000Z",
        "last_latitude": -6.2,
        "last_longitude": 106.816666,
        "notes": "Device assigned to new operator",
        "created_at": "2025-12-12T10:00:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2025-12-12T10:00:00.000000Z"

Request      

POST api/settings/devices

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

device_id   string   

ID device yang unik. Example: DEV-00001

mac_address   string  optional  

optional MAC address device. Example: 00:11:22:33:44:55

imei   string  optional  

optional IMEI number device. Example: 123456789012345

device_name   string  optional  

optional Nama device. Example: Operator Phone

platform   string  optional  

optional Platform device (android/ios/windows/linux/other). Example: android

os_version   string  optional  

optional Versi OS. Example: 13

app_version   string  optional  

optional Versi aplikasi. Example: 1.0.0

assigned_to   string  optional  

optional Nama penerima device. Example: John Doe

status   string  optional  

optional Status device. Example: active

registered_at   string  optional  

optional Tanggal registrasi (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS). Example: 2025-12-12 10:00:00

registered_by   integer  optional  

optional ID user yang mendaftarkan. Example: 1

last_login_at   string  optional  

optional Tanggal login terakhir. Example: 2025-12-12 10:05:00

last_latitude   number  optional  

optional Latitude lokasi terakhir. Example: -6.2

last_longitude   number  optional  

optional Longitude lokasi terakhir. Example: 106.816666

notes   string  optional  

optional Catatan tambahan. Example: Device assigned to new operator

Menampilkan data device berdasarkan id device.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/settings/devices/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/settings/devices/1';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

GET api/settings/devices/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Device. Example: 1

Mengubah data device berdasarkan id device.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/settings/devices/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "device_id": "DEV-00001",
    "mac_address": "00:11:22:33:44:55",
    "imei": "123456789012345",
    "device_name": "Operator Phone",
    "platform": "android",
    "os_version": "13",
    "app_version": "1.0.0",
    "assigned_to": "John Doe",
    "status": "active",
    "registered_at": "2025-12-12 10:00:00",
    "registered_by": 1,
    "last_login_at": "2025-12-12 10:05:00",
    "last_latitude": -6.2,
    "last_longitude": 106.816666,
    "notes": "Device updated"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/settings/devices/1';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'device_id' => 'DEV-00001',
            'mac_address' => '00:11:22:33:44:55',
            'imei' => '123456789012345',
            'device_name' => 'Operator Phone',
            'platform' => 'android',
            'os_version' => '13',
            'app_version' => '1.0.0',
            'assigned_to' => 'John Doe',

            'last_latitude' => -6.2,
            'last_longitude' => 106.816666,
            'notes' => 'Device updated',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

PUT api/settings/devices/{id}

PATCH api/settings/devices/{id}

Headers

Authorization      

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer   

ID Device. Example: 1

Body Parameters

device_id   string  optional  

optional ID device yang unik. Example: DEV-00001

mac_address   string  optional  

optional MAC address device. Example: 00:11:22:33:44:55

imei   string  optional  

optional IMEI number device. Example: 123456789012345

device_name   string  optional  

optional Nama device. Example: Operator Phone

platform   string  optional  

optional Platform device. Example: android

os_version   string  optional  

optional Versi OS. Example: 13

app_version   string  optional  

optional Versi aplikasi. Example: 1.0.0

assigned_to   string  optional  

optional Nama penerima device. Example: John Doe

status   string  optional  

optional Status device. Example: active

registered_at   string  optional  

optional Tanggal registrasi. Example: 2025-12-12 10:00:00

registered_by   integer  optional  

optional ID user yang mendaftarkan. Example: 1

last_login_at   string  optional  

optional Tanggal login terakhir. Example: 2025-12-12 10:05:00

last_latitude   number  optional  

optional Latitude lokasi terakhir. Example: -6.2

last_longitude   number  optional  

optional Longitude lokasi terakhir. Example: 106.816666

notes   string  optional  

optional Catatan tambahan. Example: Device updated

Menghapus data device berdasarkan id device.

requires authentication

Example request:
const url = new URL(
    "http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/settings/devices/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://dev.skj.my.id:82/api/settings/devices/1';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Authorization' => 'Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}',
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
